Introduction

Base URL: http://localhost:8002

This documentation aims to provide all the information you need to work with our API.

As you scroll, you'll see code examples for working with the API in different programming languages in the dark area to the right (or as part of the content on mobile). You can switch the language used with the tabs at the top right (or from the nav menu at the top left on mobile).

Authenticating requests

This API is not authenticated.

Categories

List all categories

Get a list of product categories with hierarchical support.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8002/api/get-all-categories?parent_id=1&root=1&featured=1&with_children=1&with_parent=1&paginate=1&per_page=20" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8002/api/get-all-categories"
);

const params = {
    "parent_id": "1",
    "root": "1",
    "featured": "1",
    "with_children": "1",
    "with_parent": "1",
    "paginate": "1",
    "per_page": "20",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
x-ratelimit-limit: 60
x-ratelimit-remaining: 59
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Success",
    "data": []
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/get-all-categories

Headers

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

parent_id   integer  optional  

Filter by parent category ID. Example: 1

root   boolean  optional  

Get only root categories (no parent). Example: true

featured   boolean  optional  

Filter by featured status. Example: true

with_children   boolean  optional  

Include children categories. Example: true

with_parent   boolean  optional  

Include parent category. Example: true

paginate   boolean  optional  

Enable or disable pagination (default: true). Set to 'false' for all items. Example: true

per_page   integer  optional  

The number of items per page. Example: 20

List all categories

Get a list of product categories with hierarchical support.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8002/api/v1/categories?parent_id=1&root=1&featured=1&with_children=1&with_parent=1&paginate=1&per_page=20" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8002/api/v1/categories"
);

const params = {
    "parent_id": "1",
    "root": "1",
    "featured": "1",
    "with_children": "1",
    "with_parent": "1",
    "paginate": "1",
    "per_page": "20",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (400):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
x-ratelimit-limit: 60
x-ratelimit-remaining: 45
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "error",
    "message": "API key missing"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/categories

Headers

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

parent_id   integer  optional  

Filter by parent category ID. Example: 1

root   boolean  optional  

Get only root categories (no parent). Example: true

featured   boolean  optional  

Filter by featured status. Example: true

with_children   boolean  optional  

Include children categories. Example: true

with_parent   boolean  optional  

Include parent category. Example: true

paginate   boolean  optional  

Enable or disable pagination (default: true). Set to 'false' for all items. Example: true

per_page   integer  optional  

The number of items per page. Example: 20

Endpoints

GET api/user

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8002/api/user" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8002/api/user"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (401):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthenticated."
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

GET api/get-all-brands

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8002/api/get-all-brands" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8002/api/get-all-brands"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Types Of Acer Laptops</span></h2><p><br></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">1. Acer Aspire</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(17, 17, 17);\">From entry-level laptops from the Acer Aspire 3 series to powerful laptops with many extras from the Acer Aspire 7 series. Everybody can find a suitable laptop in the Acer Aspire line. It makes no difference if you watch television shows, browse the internet, or use complex video editing software like Adobe Premiere Pro. You can always find an Acer Aspire that fulfills your needs.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(17, 17, 17);\">Pros of the Acer Aspire:</strong></p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(17, 17, 17); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);\">A lot of choices, divided over 3 series:</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(17, 17, 17); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);\">Acer Aspire 3: basic</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(17, 17, 17); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);\">Acer Aspire 5: mid-range</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(17, 17, 17); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);\">Acer Aspire 7: high-end</span></li></ol><p><br></p><h3><br></h3><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">2. Acer Swift</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The metal body of the Acer Swift series laptops offers them a modern appearance. These laptops are also lightweight and tiny. They are simple to transport in your bag. There are no 17-inch variants in this series; just those that are 15 inches or less.             "description": "<h1><strong>Amazon Echo Speakers Price in Nepal</strong></h1><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Amazon Echo speakers have gained immense popularity worldwide, and Nepal is no exception. These smart devices, powered by Alexa, have become a must-have for tech-savvy users who want to enjoy seamless voice control, music streaming, and smart home integration. Whether you're looking to simplify your daily routine or enhance your home entertainment experience, Amazon Echo speakers offer a variety of models tailored to different needs and budgets.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">In this article, we'll explore the benefits of using Alexa-enabled devices and compare the best Amazon Echo speakers available in Nepal, including amazon Echo Speakers Price in Nepal. Also Including third-party Alexa-enabled options from Sonos, Bose, and JBL.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Key Features of Amazon Echo Speakers</span></h3><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Amazon Echo speakers come with a range of impressive features that make them an ideal addition to any smart home setup. Here are some key features:</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">1. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Voice Control</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The heart of every Echo speaker is Alexa, Amazon's voice assistant. You can use voice commands to control your device, ask for weather updates, set reminders, and much more, hands-free.</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">2. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Music Streaming</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Echo speakers support popular music streaming services like Spotify, Amazon Music, Apple Music, and more. Simply ask Alexa to play your favorite songs, playlists, or radio stations.</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">3. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Smart Home Integration</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Echo speakers are compatible with a wide range of smart home devices, including lights, thermostats, and cameras. Alexa makes it easy to control your entire home with simple voice commands.</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">4. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Hands-Free Calling</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">With Alexa, you can make hands-free calls to anyone in your contacts, as well as send and receive messages, making communication seamless and convenient.</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">5. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Entertainment and Information</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Echo devices provide access to news, podcasts, audiobooks, and other entertainment. You can even play games, ask trivia questions, or control your TV using voice commands.</span></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Popular Amazon Echo Models</span></h3><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Amazon offers a range of Echo speakers, each designed for specific uses. Here are the most popular models available in Nepal:</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">1. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Echo Dot</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The Echo Dot is a compact, affordable option that still delivers powerful sound and full Alexa functionality. It's perfect for small spaces like bedrooms or offices.</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">2. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Echo</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The standard Amazon Echo offers excellent sound quality and enhanced smart home features. It's great for living rooms or larger spaces.</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">3. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Echo Show</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The Echo Show comes with a built-in display, making it ideal for video calls, watching videos, or viewing recipes in the kitchen. It adds a visual element to the Alexa experience.</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">4. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Echo Studio</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">For audiophiles, the Echo Studio provides premium sound quality with Dolby Atmos and 3D audio. It's designed for users who prioritize music quality.</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">5. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Echo Pop</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">A smaller, stylish model, Echo Pop is perfect for users looking for a portable smart speaker with a modern design.</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">6. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Echo Sub</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The Echo Sub pairs with other Echo devices to provide a deep, rich bass sound, making it ideal for home theater setups.</span></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Price Comparison of Amazon Echo Speakers in Nepal</span></h3><div class=\"quill-better-table-wrapper\"><table class=\"quill-better-table\" speakers</span></p></td></tr></tbody></table></div><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Third-Party Alexa-Enabled Speakers</span></h3><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">In addition to Amazon's own Echo devices, several third-party brands offer Alexa-enabled speakers with unique features and design options. They are fully compatible with Alexa, making them a great choice for users who prioritize sound quality and seamless smart home integration.</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">2. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Bose</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Bose offers premium smart speakers with Alexa integration, known for their crystal-clear audio and sleek design. Bose speakers tend to be on the pricier side, but they deliver superior sound performance.</span></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">3. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">JBL</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">JBL's Alexa-enabled speakers are known for their rugged build and portability. These speakers are ideal for outdoor use and travel, offering durability without sacrificing sound quality.</span></p><div class=\"quill-better-table-wrapper\"><table class=\"quill-better-table\" control</span></p></td></tr></tbody></table></div><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Factors to Consider When Buying an Amazon Echo Speaker</span></h3><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">When selecting the right Amazon Echo or Alexa-enabled speaker for your home, consider the following factors:</span></p><p><br></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">1. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Budget</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Amazon Echo speakers come in a range of prices, from affordable options like the Echo Dot to premium devices like the Echo Studio. Choose one that fits your budget while offering the features you need.</span></p><p><br></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">2. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Sound Quality</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">If you're an audiophile, you may want to opt for the Echo Studio or third-party options like Sonos and Bose, which provide superior sound quality. For basic usage, the Echo Dot or Echo should suffice.</span></p><p><br></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">3. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Size and Placement</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Consider where you'll be placing your Echo speaker. Smaller models like the Echo Dot are great for compact spaces, while larger models like the Echo or Echo Studio are better suited for living rooms.</span></p><p><br></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">4. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Smart Home Compatibility</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">If you already have smart home devices, make sure your Echo speaker is compatible with them. Most Echo speakers support a wide range of smart home gadgets, but it's always a good idea to double-check.</span></p><p><br></p><h4><span class=\"ql-size-large\">5. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Additional Features</strong></h4><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Do you want a screen for video calls or watching videos? The Echo Show might be a good fit. If you're looking for portability, consider the Echo Pop or JBL Link.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Amazon Echo speakers have transformed how we interact with technology in our homes, providing hands-free control, entertainment, and smart home integration. Whether you're looking for a budget-friendly choice like the Echo Dot or a high-end audio experience with the Echo Studio, there's an Echo speaker to meet every need.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">At </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Fatafat Sewa</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\">, we make your shopping experience even better with </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">free delivery all over Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\">, along with </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">same-day delivery</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> in select areas. Now you can get your favorite Amazon Echo device quickly and at your doorstep without any extra shipping costs.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Explore our wide selection of Amazon Echo speakers and choose the perfect one to elevate your smart home experience!</span></p>",

So while watching pictures or videos, the content is not just immersive on its big screen but also looks serviceably sharp. likewise, the laptop has a slim form factor and is light in terms of weight. So it will not hurt your reverse while carrying it around.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Best Dell laptops in Nepal under 1 Lakh</strong></h2><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Under the price of 1 Lakh, Dell G3 is a great option. For the price, it has one of the super-performing i5- 8300H processors, which handles indeed the demanding tasks without a fuss. And then you get a cache of 8 GB and 8 GB of RAM, which further enhances the fluidity. Not only that, but the laptop is also available with a GTX 1050Ti plates card, which runs indeed some demanding games at decent frame rates. So considering the value it offers, you can not really go wrong with the Dell G3.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">How to Buy Dell Laptops in Nepal? </strong></h2><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Who does not want Laptops? Through a phone call</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\">You avoid all of that clumsy way and make a simple call as well. After making a phone call, you can ask about the vacuity of the product you want and can also place an order.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\">3. You'll gain more product knowledge, which will aid in decision-making.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h2><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Don't Get Grounded! A Guide to Flying Drones Legally in Nepal</strong></h2><p><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Dreaming of capturing breathtaking aerial views of Nepal with a drone? Hold on! While drones are illegal to operate without permits, getting them is easier than you think. Here's what you need to know:</span></p><p><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Get Permission to Fly:</strong></p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Civil Aviation Authority of Nepal (CAAN) is Your Go-To: </strong><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Before you take off, apply for and receive permission from CAAN. They set the rules for drone flights.</span></li></ol><p><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Respect the Rules:</strong></p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Safety First: </strong><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Never fly over people or crowds. Respect privacy and avoid flying near people who seem uncomfortable.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Good Weather, Good Time: </strong><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Fly only during daylight in good weather conditions.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">No-Fly Zones: </strong><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Steer clear of military installations, power plants, and areas that might raise security concerns.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Air Traffic Control: </strong><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Maintain a safe distance from airports and areas with active aircraft.</span></li></ol><p><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Obtaining a Permit:</strong><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\"> (This process typically takes 3 days)</span></p><ol><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Municipal Permission: </strong><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">First, get a permission letter from the local municipality where you plan to fly.</span></li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">CDO Recommendation: </strong><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Next, obtain a recommendation letter from the Chief District Officer's (CDO) office. They'll need the municipal permission letter first.</span></li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Police Security Clearance: </strong><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">The police headquarters of your planned flight zone will issue a security clearance letter or provide security if needed.</span></li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Submit Documents to CAAN: </strong><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Finally, submit all the collected documents (permission letter, recommendation letter, and security clearance letter) to CAAN.</span></li></ol><p><strong style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Flying Responsibly:</strong></p><p><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(31, 31, 31);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Remember, with permission comes responsibility. Fly your drone safely and respectfully, leaving a positive impression on Nepal's beautiful landscapes and people.</span></p>",

                "thumb": "https://fatafatsewa.com/storage/media/4585/conversions/dji-drone-logo-thumb.webp"
            }

            "description": "<h2><strong>Vivo X300 Pro Price in Nepal – Full Specs and EMI Offers</strong></h2><p><strong>Vivo X300 Pro</strong> is a premium flagship smartphone in Nepal that combines powerful performance, advanced camera capabilities, and a sleek design. The official <strong>Vivo X300 Pro price in Nepal</strong> is <strong>NPR 179,999</strong> for the 16GB RAM + 512GB storage variant, offering a top-tier smartphone experience for professionals, gamers, and photography enthusiasts alike.</p><p>With its elegant design, smooth display, and high-end features, Vivo X300 Pro stands out as a device that delivers both style and substance.</p><h2><strong>Vivo X300 Pro Overview</strong></h2><p>Vivo X300 Pro is powered by the <strong>MediaTek Dimensity 9500 chipset</strong>, paired with <strong>16GB of RAM</strong> and <strong>512GB storage</strong>, delivering lightning fast performance for multitasking, gaming, and demanding applications. Its <strong>6.78-inch AMOLED display</strong> with a <strong>120Hz refresh rate</strong> ensures crisp visuals, smooth scrolling, and an immersive viewing experience.</p><h3><strong>Battery &amp; Charging</strong></h3><p>It houses a <strong>6510mAh battery</strong>, capable of lasting an entire day even with heavy usage, and supports <strong>ultra-fast wired and wireless charging</strong>, keeping you connected with minimal downtime.</p><h3><strong>Camera System</strong></h3><p>Phone features a <strong>triple rear camera setup</strong>, including a high-resolution <strong>200MP periscope telephoto lens</strong>, a wide angle lens, and a main camera for detailed and vibrant photos. It's front camera is equally impressive, perfect for selfies and video calls. Advanced features like night mode, portrait effects, and AI enhancements make photography a breeze.</p><h3><strong>Additional Features</strong></h3><p>Vivo X300 Pro comes with an <strong>in-display fingerprint scanner</strong> for secure and convenient unlocking. It supports <strong>5G connectivity</strong>, ensuring fast internet speeds and smooth downloads or streaming. The phone features a <strong>premium build</strong> with a sleek glass and metal finish, giving it a stylish and durable design. Additionally, its <strong>stereo speakers</strong> provide an enhanced audio experience with clear and immersive sound.</p><h2><strong>EMI Options at Fatafat Sewa (Nepal)</strong></h2><p>Purchasing the Vivo X300 Pro is simple with flexible EMI plans:</p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>40% Down Payment EMI</strong> (No Credit Card Required)</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>0% Down Payment EMI</strong> (Available with Partner Bank Credit Cards)</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Supported by <strong>14+ Nepali Banks</strong></li></ol><p>These plans allow students, professionals, and tech enthusiasts to enjoy flagship-level performance without paying the full price upfront.</p><h2><strong>FAQs on Vivo X300 Pro Price in Nepal</strong></h2><p><strong>Q1. What is the price of Vivo X300 Pro in Nepal?</strong></p><p><strong>A.</strong> The official price is <strong>NPR 179,999</strong> for the 16GB + 512GB variant.</p><p><strong>Q2. Does the Vivo X300 Pro support fast charging?</strong></p><p><strong>A.</strong> Yes, it supports both <strong>fast wired and wireless charging</strong> for quick power-ups.</p><p><strong>Q3. Is the Vivo X300 Pro good for photography?</strong></p><p><strong>A.</strong> Absolutely, its <strong>200MP periscope camera and AI features</strong> make it ideal for high-quality photos and videos.</p><p><strong>Q4. What display does the Vivo X300 Pro have?</strong></p><p><strong>A.</strong> It has a <strong>6.78-inch AMOLED display</strong> with <strong>120Hz refresh rate</strong> for smooth visuals and vibrant colors.</p><p><strong>Q5. Can I buy the Vivo X300 Pro on EMI?</strong></p><p><strong>A.</strong> Yes, Fatafat Sewa offers multiple EMI options with or without a credit card.</p>",

                    "Resolution": "1260 x 2800 pixels, 20:9 (~452 ppi)",
                    "Protection": "Armor Glass, Mohs level 4, IP68/IP69 water and dust resistance",
                    "Operating System": "Android 16, OriginOS 6",
                    "Chipset": "MediaTek Dimensity 9500 (3 nm)",
                    "CPU": "Octa-core (1x4.21 GHz C1-Ultra & 3x3.5 GHz C1-Premium & 4x2.7 GHz C1-Pro)",
                    "GPU": "Arm G1-Ultra",
                    "RAM": "16 GB",
                    "STORAGE": "512 GB",
                    "Rear Camera": "Triple: 50MP wide + 200MP periscope telephoto + 50MP ultrawide; Zeiss optics, Laser AF, LED flash, HDR",
                    "Front Camera": "50MP wide, HDR",
                    "Video": "Rear: 8K@30fps, 4K@30/60/120fps, 1080p@30/60/120/240fps; Front: 4K@30/60fps, 1080p@30/60fps",
                    "WLAN": "Wi-Fi 802.11 a/b/g/n/ac/6/7, dual-band",
                    "Sensors": "Fingerprint (under display, ultrasonic), accelerometer, gyro, proximity, compass, optional satellite connectivity",
                    "Battery": "6510 mAh (Global), 5440 mAh",
                    "Charging": "90W wired, 40W wireless, reverse wired & wireless",
                    "Color": "Black",
                    "Price in Nepal": "179999"
                }
            },

GET api/categorys/navbarItems

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:8002/api/categorys/navbarItems" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8002/api/categorys/navbarItems"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

            "title": "Laptop",
            "slug": "laptop-price-in-nepal",
            "description": "<h1 class=\"ql-align-justify\">Laptop Price in Nepal</h1><p><span style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);\">In today’s fast-paced digital world, owning a reliable laptop has become a necessity for work, education, and entertainment. If you’re in Nepal and planning to buy a laptop in 2025, you’re in the right place. This article provides updated laptop price&nbsp;in Nepal in 2025.Highlights of Pricing Specs and flexible EMI plans available at Fatafat Sewa.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><strong>1. Latest Laptop Prices in Nepal 2025</strong></h2><p>The laptop market in Nepal is booming with options from top brands like HP, Dell, Apple, Asus, and Lenovo. Here’s a quick overview of the latest prices for popular models in 2025:</p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Budget Laptops (Under NPR 80,000): </strong>Ideal for students and casual users.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Mid-Range Laptops (NPR 80,000 - 150,000): </strong>Perfect for professionals and gamers.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Premium Laptops (Above NPR 150,000): </strong>High-performance devices for heavy tasks and gaming.</li></ol><p><br></p><h3><strong>2. Top Brands and Their Popular Models</strong></h3><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>HP: </strong><a href=\"https://fatafatsewa.com/product-detail/hp-pavilion-x360-13-2022-i5-12th-gen-8gb-ram-512gb-ssd-14-fhd-touchscreen-display\" target=\"_blank\">HP Pavilion</a>, HP Envy, and HP Spectre series.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Dell:</strong>Dell Inspiron, Dell XPS, and Dell Alienware.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Apple: </strong>MacBook Air and MacBook Pro with M-series chips.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Asus:</strong>Asus Vivobook, Asus Zenbook, and Asus ROG series.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Lenovo: </strong>Lenovo IdeaPad, Lenovo ThinkPad, and Lenovo Legion.</li></ol><p><br></p><h3><strong>3. EMI Plans at Fatafat Sewa</strong></h3><p>Fatafat Sewa offers convenient EMI (Equated Monthly Installment) plans to make purchasing laptops more affordable. Here’s why you should consider their EMI options:</p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Flexible Tenure: </strong>Choose repayment periods ranging from 3 to 18 months.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Low Interest Rates: </strong>Competitive rates to suit your budget.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Easy Application Process: </strong>Quick approval and hassle-free documentation.</li></ol><p>Whether you’re a student or a professional, EMI plans can help you own your dream laptop without straining your finances.</p><p><br></p><h4><strong>4. Tips to Find the Best Deals</strong></h4><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Compare Prices: </strong>Check multiple products in a similar price range in Fatafat Sewa.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Look for Discounts: Check out</strong> the latest offers from Fatafat Sewa in Laptop Deals.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Check Warranty and After-Sales Service: </strong>Ensure the laptop comes with a valid warranty and reliable customer support.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Read Reviews: </strong>Research user reviews and expert opinions before making a decision.</li></ol><p><br></p><h3><strong>Where can I purchase the best laptop near me?</strong></h3><p>When looking for the <strong>best laptop at an affordable price in Kathmandu, Nepal</strong>, Fatafat Sewa offers a variety of options. Depending on your needs, you can choose from different <strong>laptop brands</strong> available at these Fatafat Sewa. However, if you want to buy the best laptop at a budget-friendly price and prefer shopping online, <strong>Fatafat Sewa</strong> is a great choice. Located in Sitapaila, Kathmandu, Fatafat Sewa provides an excellent platform for finding the <strong>best laptops in Nepal</strong> at competitive prices.</p><h3><br></h3><h3><strong>Why Choose Fatafat Sewa?</strong></h3><p><strong>Fatafat Sewa</strong> is a trusted online store in Kathmandu with years of experience in delivering laptops and electronics across Nepal. Here’s why it stands out:</p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Wide Range of Brands</strong>: Fatafat Sewa offers everything from budget-friendly laptops to high-end gaming machines.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Competitive Pricing</strong>: Get the best deals without compromising on quality.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Flexible EMI Plans</strong>: Buy laptops with easy EMI options—no interest or down payment required.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Authentic Products</strong>: All laptops come with guaranteed authenticity and warranty.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Customer Satisfaction</strong>: Dedicated support is available to assist before and after your purchase.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Nationwide Delivery</strong>: Enjoy delivery across Nepal, with cash-on-delivery available in Kathmandu Valley.</li></ol><h3><br></h3><h2><strong>Available Laptop Brands in Nepal – 2025</strong></h2><p>When it comes to buying a laptop in Nepal, there are numerous options available to suit every budget and need. Whether you're a student, a professional, or a gaming enthusiast, you'll find the right laptop brand that fits your requirements. In this article, we’ll take a closer look at some of the top laptop brands in Nepal and their availability in the market. If you’re searching for laptop prices in Nepal, this guide will help you explore the best brands and their offerings, including the latest models from 2025.</p><h3><strong>1. Dell</strong></h3><p>Dell is a highly trusted brand in Nepal, known for offering laptops that are both reliable and high-performing. Dell laptops are perfect for students, professionals, and even gamers. Popular Dell laptop series in Nepal include Inspiron, XPS, Alienware, and Latitude.</p><h4><strong>New Models in 2025:</strong></h4><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Dell XPS 15 (2025): </strong>Featuring Intel’s 14th Gen processors and NVIDIA RTX 40-series GPUs, this model is perfect for creatives and professionals.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Dell Alienware m18 (2025): </strong>A gaming beast with an 18\" QHD+ display, AMD Ryzen 9 processors, and advanced cooling technology.</li></ol><p><a href=\"https://fatafatsewa.com/brand/dell-laptop-price-in-nepal\" target=\"_blank\"><strong>Dell laptop price in Nepal</strong></a><strong> </strong>varies based on the model and specifications, but they are known for offering competitive pricing without compromising on quality.</p><h3><strong>2. class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Since 2006, Apple Inc. has created and sold the MacBook line of Mac notebook computers, which run on the macOS operating system. When Apple stated in 2005 that it will switch to using Intel CPUs, it took the place of the PowerBook and iBook brands. The MacBook Air (2008-present) and the MacBook Pro make up the current lineup (2006–present). There were two distinct \"MacBook\" series that ran from 2006 to 2012 and 2015 to 2019.&nbsp;</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">From late 2011 until early 2014, the manufacture of the original MacBook was halted; it resumed at the start of 2015. The 2015 model, which went by titles like \"New MacBook\" and \"MacBook Retina,\" came with a number of important updates. The Force Touch trackpad and a butterfly mechanism for the keyboard's switches were two advances. In this article, we will be talking about the </span><strong style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">MacBook price in Nepal</strong><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"> along with their specifications.</span></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h2><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Types of MacBook Models</span></h2><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);\">The many Apple MacBook models available, their features, and their prices in Nepal are covered below. This list will be updated each time a new model arrives in Nepal.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h3><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">1.</span><strong style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\"> MacBook Air</strong></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">The MacBook Air was introduced as a low-cost, portable replacement for the MacBook. While the first version was introduced as a luxury ultraportable to compete with the 2006–2012 MacBook, subsequent iterations' lower costs and the MacBook's demise have transformed it into the entry-level Mac portable. The only model without a Retina Display is the MacBook Air as a result. The MacBook Air was the lightest and smallest model of the MacBook range when it was initially introduced in January 2008.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">2.</span><strong style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\"> MacBook Pro</strong></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">The MacBook Pro, often known as the MBP, is a somewhat larger and optionally thicker notebook than the MacBook. It is designed for people who require their laptop to handle more demanding jobs like video editing and has more powerful internals. The first Apple device to use their exclusive Thunderbolt port was the MacBook Pro in 2011. Apple's premium laptop, the MacBook Pro, comes in 13-inch, 15-inch, and 16-inch sizes. In October 2018, the 13-inch MacBook Pro of the latest generation was unveiled. It has four USB-C connections that also operate as Thunderbolt 3 ports, an integrated Touch ID sensor with the power button, and an OLED display strip that is touch-sensitive.</span></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h2><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">How to buy MacBooks in Nepal?</span></h2><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Our store's listing of the Apple MacBook Price in Nepal is rather fair. Xiaomi&nbsp;Mobile</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent;\">Chinese company Xiaomi has strengthened its position in the smartphone market by releasing a variety of devices with strong price-to-spec ratios. The business has recently broadened its scope to become a true technological hub. The firm has been concentrating on bringing devices and other accessories like Mi TV, Mi fitness bands, Mi Air Purifier, and so on in addition to its regular manufacture of smartphones. Xiaomi is present at every price point in the market, from the entry-level to the high-end premium segments. Redmi and POCO are two distinct sub-brands of Xiaomi. One of the most well-liked series among users is the Redmi line. Visit Fatafat sewa to know the </span><a href=\"https://fatafatsewa.com/brand/xiaomi-mobile-price-in-nepal\" target=\"_blank\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">Xiaomi mobile price in delivery in Nepal. We offer a wide range of services in Nepal. We put a lot of effort into providing the best delivery we can as the leading mobile distributors in Nepal.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent;\">Purchase the Mobile from top manufacturers at fatafatsewa.com as it is the best online platform for Mobile. If you simply follow these steps, you could even wish to buy one.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent;\">1. Through the Fatafat Sewa website</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent;\">Select the item you want and complete the purchase by adding it to your basket. Once you have finished adding, move on to checkout. Follow the site's instructions, and you're done. A call of confirmation will shortly reach you. Then, within a few days, your items will be delivered to your area.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent;\">2. Through Fatafat Sewa phone order</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent;\">You can also place your order over the phone if you don't feel like going through all these processes. In order to prevent confusion regarding the product you choose, you must provide comprehensive information about it. Call us at (982) 875-7575.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent;\">3. Drop by Fatafat sewa store</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent;\">You are welcome to stop by our office at Sitapaila Road-4, Kathmandu if you have any remaining questions concerning the goods. You'll gain more product knowledge, which will aid in decision-making.</span></p>",

                    "title": "Apple iPhone",

                    "description": "<h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Apple: Brand Overview</span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Apple Inc. was founded in 1976. It is a leader in technology, known for products like the iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch. The brand focuses on sleek design, ease of use, and privacy. Apple’s marketing is simple and tells a story, which builds customer loyalty. However, the company faces challenges such as market saturation, regulation issues, and supply chain risks. Despite these, Apple remains an icon in the tech world.</span></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">History of Apple in Nepal</span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Apple first entered Nepal in the early 2000s through unofficial imports. Products like Macs and iPods were popular among early tech users. As smartphones like the iPhone gained popularity, demand grew. Local distributors were appointed to make products more accessible.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">In the 2020s, Apple expanded with authorized retailers in major cities. Today, Apple products are widely available in Nepal, especially among young professionals and tech enthusiasts. The brand continues to grow as Nepal’s relationship with technology evolves.</span></p><h1><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">iPhone Price in Nepal 2025</strong></h1><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">As we welcome the New Year in 2025, iPhone prices in Nepal have seen a welcome reduction! With special New Year offers from Fatafat Sewa, Apple fans can now get their hands on the latest iPhone models at more affordable prices. Whether you're eyeing the High-End iPhone 16 series or looking for a budget-friendly older model, now is the perfect time to make your purchase. Along with the price drop, Fatafat Sewa offering exciting EMI plans to make buying an iPhone even easier.</span></p><h2><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">iPhone Price Drop in Nepal: New Year 2025 Offers</strong></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Thanks to festive season offers and discounts, the iPhone price in Nepal has decreased, providing a great opportunity to own a high-end Apple device. Below are the updated prices for different iPhone models in Nepal, along with the EMI plans available.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">As of March 2025, here is a list of all data-colspan=\"1\">5,750</p></td></tr></tbody></table></div><p><br></p><h3><br></h3><h3><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Why Choose EMI Plans for iPhone?</strong></h3><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Apple iPhones are known for their premium quality, but the upfront cost can sometimes be a deterrent. That’s where EMI plans come into play. By opting for EMI plans, you can divide the cost of your iPhone into smaller, manageable monthly payments. So Fatafat Sewa, offers you </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">0% interest EMI</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> options for up to </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">24 months</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\">, making it easier to own the latest iPhone without paying the entire amount upfront.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Conclusion</strong></h3><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">iPhone prices in Nepal have decreased with the arrival of 2025, making it the perfect time to upgrade to a new Apple device. Whether you’re interested in the flagship iPhone 16 Pro Max or a more affordable iPhone 11, there are plenty of options to choose from. With exciting New Year offers and EMI plans, buying an iPhone has become more accessible than ever.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Explore the latest iPhone models, compare prices, and take advantage of EMI options to get your dream iPhone today.</span></p>",

                            "title": "iPhone 17 Series",
                            "slug": "iphone-17-series",
                            "description": "<h1>iPhone 17 Series Price in Nepal (2025)</h1><p>Apple has officially revealed the <strong>iPhone 17 Series price in Nepal</strong>.                     "description": "<h1>Samsung Mobile Price in Nepal: Buy on EMI with Hulas Finserv</h1><p>Looking to buy the latest <strong>Samsung smartphones</strong> but don’t want to pay the full amount upfront? At <strong>Fatafat Sewa</strong>, we’ve partnered with <strong>Hulas Finserv</strong> to provide flexible EMI options, making it easier for you to own your favorite Samsung devices. With minimal documentation and a hassle-free process, purchasing a smartphone is now more convenient than ever.</p><h2>Samsung Mobile Price in Nepal</h2><p>Samsung smartphones are among the most popular devices in Nepal, offering a wide range of models from premium flagships to budget-friendly options. Whether you're looking for the cutting-edge <strong>Galaxy Z Fold 6</strong> or the value-packed <strong>Galaxy A15 5G</strong>, Fatafat Sewa has got you covered.</p><p><br></p><h3>Here are as possible. To apply for Hulas Finserv EMI, all you need is:</p><ol><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Citizenship Copy</strong></li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>2 Passport-Size Photos</strong></li></ol><p>No lengthy forms or complex requirements—just submit these basic documents, and you’re good to go!</p><h4><br></h4><h4><strong>Why Choose Fatafat Sewa for Samsung Smartphones?</strong></h4><p>Fatafat Sewa is Nepal’s first service-oriented e-commerce platform, known for its customer-centric approach. Here’s why buying your <strong>Samsung mobile</strong> from us is the best choice:</p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Latest Samsung Models</strong>: We offer a wide range of Samsung devices to meet every need and budget.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Flexible EMI Plans</strong>: With Hulas Finserv, enjoy <strong>0% interest EMI</strong> for up to 12 months.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Hassle-Free Documentation</strong>: Just submit your <strong>citizenship copy</strong> and <strong>passport-size photos</strong> to get started.</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Convenience</strong>: Free delivery, mobile insurance, and repair services are available for your convenience.</li></ol><h4><br></h4><h4><strong>How to Buy Samsung Smartphones on EMI?</strong></h4><p>Buying a <strong>Samsung mobile</strong> in Nepal with EMI at Fatafat Sewa is quick and straightforward:</p><ol><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Choose Your Smartphone</strong>: Explore our collection of Samsung smartphones and pick your favorite.</li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Select EMI Option</strong>: During checkout, choose the <strong>Hulas Finserv EMI plan</strong>.</li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Submit Required Documents</strong>: Upload your <strong>citizenship copy</strong> and <strong>2 passport-size photos</strong>.</li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong>Quick Approval</strong>: With in 30 Min approval time, Once approved, we’ll deliver your Samsung smartphone to your doorstep.</li></ol><h4><br></h4><h4><strong>Samsung Mobile Price in Nepal: The Best Deals</strong></h4><p>With Fatafat Sewa and Hulas Finserv, owning a Samsung smartphone has never been easier. Whether it’s the premium <strong>Galaxy Z Fold 6</strong>, the flagship <strong>Galaxy S25 Ultra</strong>, or the affordable <strong>Galaxy A04</strong>, we have an EMI plan to suit every budget.</p><p>Don’t let the price hold you back. Buy your dream <strong>Samsung mobile in Nepal</strong> today with easy EMI options! Visit <strong>Fatafat Sewa</strong> and explore the latest models now.</p>",

        {
            "id": 66,
            "title": "TV & Home Appliances",
            "slug": "home-appliances-price-in-nepal",
            "description": "<h1 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">Home Appliances In Nepal</span></h1><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">A home appliance is a device that helps with the housework, including cooking, cleaning, and food preservation. It is also known as a domestic appliance, an electric appliance, or a household appliance.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">Air conditioners, dishwashers, clothes dryers, drying cabinets, freezers, refrigerators, kitchen stoves, water heaters, washing machines, trash compactors, microwave ovens, and induction cookers are just a few examples of significant appliances, commonly referred to as white goods. Here in this article, we will be talking about the </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">home appliances price in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The Top 6 Must Have Home Appliances in Nepal for Modern Living</span></h2><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Are you looking to upgrade your home with the latest appliances? Look no further! In this article, we will explore the top 10 must-have home appliances in Nepal for modern living. From sleek kitchen gadgets to smart home solutions, we have curated a list of appliances that will enhance your daily life.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">In today's fast-paced world, convenience and efficiency are essential. Our carefully chosen selection of appliances includes the latest technology and innovative features to make your life easier. Whether you're a cooking enthusiast looking for a high-performance oven or a busy professional in need of a time-saving washing machine, we have you covered.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">We understand the importance of quality and reliability when it comes to home appliances. That's why our list only includes brands known for their superior products and customer satisfaction. We've done the research, so you can make an informed decision and invest in appliances that will stand the test of time.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">So, are you ready to upgrade your home? Let's dive into the top 10 must-have home appliances in Nepal for modern living and transform your living space into a haven of convenience and comfort.</span></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Factors to consider when choosing home appliances</span></h2><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">When it comes to choosing the right home appliances for your needs, there are several factors to consider. These factors will help you make an informed decision and ensure that the appliances you choose are a perfect fit for your lifestyle and requirements. Here are some key factors to keep in mind:</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">1. Budget: Before you start shopping for appliances, it's important to determine your budget. Appliances come in a wide range of prices, so having a budget in mind will help you narrow down your options and find appliances that are within your price range.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">2. Size and Space: Consider the size of your kitchen or living space when choosing appliances. Measure the available space and ensure that the appliances you choose will fit comfortably without overcrowding the area.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">3. Energy Efficiency: Energy-efficient appliances not only help you save on your electricity bills but also reduce your carbon footprint. Look for appliances with high energy star ratings to ensure maximum efficiency.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">4. Features and Functionality: Think about the features and functionality you need in your appliances. For example, if you love baking, look for ovens with convection settings and multiple racks. If you have a large family, opt for washing machines with higher load capacities.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">5. Brand Reputation: Research the reputation of different appliance brands before making a purchase. Look for brands known for their quality, reliability, and excellent customer service.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">By considering these factors, you can make an informed decision and choose appliances that will meet your specific needs and preferences.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The top 10 must-have home appliances in Nepal</span></h2><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Now that we've covered the factors to consider when choosing home appliances, let's dive into the top 10 must-have home appliances in Nepal for modern living. These appliances have been carefully selected based on their performance, features, and overall value for money. Let's explore each of them in detail:</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">1. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Refrigerators</strong></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Refrigerators are an essential appliance in every home. They help keep your food fresh and beverages cool. When choosing a refrigerator, consider factors such as capacity, energy efficiency, and special features like ice dispensers or adjustable shelves. Some of the top refrigerator brands in Nepal include Samsung, LG, CG and Whirlpool.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">2. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Washing Machines</strong></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Having a washing machine can save you a lot of time and effort when it comes to doing laundry. Look for washing machines with features like different wash programs, load sensors, and quick wash options. Popular washing machine brands in Nepal include LG, Samsung, CG, Sensei, Midea and Panasonic.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">3. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Air Conditioners</strong></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">With the rise in temperatures during the summer months, air conditioners have become a necessity in many homes. When choosing an air conditioner, consider factors such as cooling capacity, energy efficiency ratings, and special features like inverter technology or smart connectivity. Some of the top air conditioner brands in Nepal include Daikin, Samsung, Midea, CG, LG and Panasonic.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">4. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Televisions</strong></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Televisions are not just a source of entertainment but also a centerpiece of your living room. When choosing a television, consider factors such as screen size, resolution, smart features, and connectivity options. Popular television brands in Nepal include Samsung, Sony, CG, Midea, Sensei and LG.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">5. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Microwaves</strong></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Microwaves are a convenient appliance for quick cooking and reheating meals. Look for microwaves with features like convection cooking, multiple power levels, and preset cooking options. Some of the top microwave brands in Nepal include Samsung, LG, CG and Midea.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">6. Vacuum Cleaner</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">7. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Rice Cookers</strong></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Rice cookers are a must-have appliance for any household that enjoys rice-based dishes. Look for rice cookers with features like automatic cooking and keep-warm functions. Popular rice cooker brands in Nepal include Baltra, Philips, and CG.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Refrigerators - Types, Features, and Top Brands in Nepal</span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Refrigerators/ Fridge are an essential part of every modern kitchen. They not only keep your food fresh but also add style and sophistication to your home. You can find a wide range of refrigerators </span><a href=\"https://fatafatsewa.com/category/refrigerator-price-in-nepal?\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"ql-size-large\">fridge in Nepal</a><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> with various features to suit your needs. Whether you prefer a sleek French door design or a space-saving top freezer model, there's something for everyone.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">When choosing a refrigerator, consider factors such as capacity, energy efficiency, and special features. Some popular brands in Nepal include Samsung, LG, CG, Midea and Whirlpool. These brands offer a range of options, from basic models to high-end refrigerators with advanced technology like inverter compressors and smart connectivity.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Investing in a quality refrigerator will not only enhance your daily life but also save you money in the long run. With energy-efficient models, you can reduce your electricity bills while enjoying the convenience of a well-organized and properly preserved food storage solution.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Washing machines - types, features, and top brands in Nepal</span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Gone are the days of hand-washing and spending hours doing laundry. With a modern washing machine, you can save time and effort while ensuring clean and fresh clothes. In Nepal, there are various types of washing machines available, including top load, front load, and semi-automatic models.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Top load washing machines are popular for their affordability and ease of use. They are ideal for smaller households and come with features like multiple wash programs and quick wash options. On the other hand, front load washing machines are known for their superior cleaning performance and energy efficiency. They are perfect for larger families or individuals who prioritize clean and stain-free clothes.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Some top brands to consider when purchasing a </span><a href=\"https://fatafatsewa.com/category/washing-machine-price-in-nepal\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"ql-size-large\">washing machine in Nepal</a><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> are Samsung, LG, CG, Midea and Haier. These brands offer a wide range of models with features like inverter technology, steam wash, and smart controls. Investing in a quality washing machine will not only save you time but also ensure the longevity of your clothes by providing gentle yet effective cleaning.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Air conditioners - types, features, and top brands in Nepal</span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Living in a country like Nepal, where the summers can be scorching hot, an air conditioner is a must-have appliance to beat the heat. Air conditioners not only cool your living space but also improve air quality and create a comfortable environment for you and your family.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">When choosing an air conditioner, consider factors such as cooling capacity, energy efficiency rating, and special features like sleep mode and air purification. In Nepal, you can find various types of air conditioners, including split ACs, window ACs, and portable ACs.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Some top brands to consider when purchasing an air conditioner in Nepal are Daikin, Hitachi, and Carrier. These brands offer a range of models with features like inverter technology, eco-friendly refrigerants, and smart controls. Investing in a quality air conditioner will not only help you stay cool during the hot summer months but also improve your overall well-being by providing clean and fresh air.</span></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Televisions - types, features, and top brands in Nepal</span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Televisions are not just a source of entertainment but also a centerpiece of your living room. With the advancement of technology, televisions have become smarter and more immersive, providing an incredible viewing experience. In Nepal, you can find a wide range of televisions with various display sizes and features to suit your preferences.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">When choosing a television, consider factors such as display technology, resolution, and smart features. LED and OLED TVs are popular choices for their vibrant colors and high contrast ratios. 4K and HDR support provide an enhanced viewing experience, bringing your favorite movies and shows to life.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Some top brands to consider when purchasing a </span><a href=\"https://fatafatsewa.com/category/tv-price-in-nepal\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"ql-size-large\">television in Nepal</a><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> are Sony, Samsung, and LG. These brands offer a range of models with features like smart TV functionality, voice control, and built-in streaming services. Investing in a quality television will not only provide endless hours of entertainment but also enhance your home decor with its sleek and modern design.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Microwaves - types, features, and top brands in Nepal</span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Microwaves have become an essential </span><a href=\"https://fatafatsewa.com/brand/himstar-appliances-price-in-nepal\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"ql-size-large\">kitchen appliance</a><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> for their convenience and time-saving capabilities. Whether you're warming up leftovers or cooking a quick meal, a microwave can make your life easier and more efficient. In Nepal, you can find a wide range of microwaves with various features and capacities to suit your cooking needs.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">When choosing a microwave, consider factors such as capacity, power output, and cooking modes. Solo microwaves are ideal for basic heating and defrosting, while grill microwaves offer additional grilling capabilities. Convection microwaves combine microwave and convection oven technology, providing a versatile cooking experience.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Some popular brands to consider when purchasing a microwave in Nepal are Samsung, Panasonic, and Whirlpool. These brands offer a range of models with features like sensor cooking, pre-programmed menus, and child lock safety options. Investing in a quality microwave will not only save you time in the kitchen but also open up a world of culinary possibilities.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Rice cookers - Types, Features, and Top Brands in Nepal</span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Rice is a staple food in Nepal, and having a reliable rice cooker can make the cooking process hassle-free. A good rice cooker ensures perfectly cooked rice every time, allowing you to focus on other aspects of your meal preparation. In Nepal, you can find a variety of rice cookers with different capacities and features to suit your needs.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">When choosing a rice cooker, consider factors such as capacity, cooking modes, and additional features like keep-warm function and delay start. Some rice cookers also come with multi-cooking options, allowing you to steam vegetables and prepare soups and stews.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Some popular brands to consider when purchasing a rice cooker in Nepal are Panasonic, Philips, and Bajaj. These brands offer a range of models with features like fuzzy logic technology, non-stick inner pots, and easy-to-use controls. Investing in a quality rice cooker will not only simplify your cooking process but also ensure perfectly cooked rice every time.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Conclusion and final thoughts on investing in home appliances for modern living in Nepal</span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Investing in the right home appliances can greatly enhance your daily life and make your home more comfortable and convenient. We've explored the top 6 must-have home appliances in Nepal for modern living, covering a range of categories from refrigerators to rice cookers. By considering factors like budget, size, energy efficiency, features, and brand reputation, you can make an informed decision and choose appliances that will meet your specific needs and preferences.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Upgrade your home with these appliances and transform your living space into a haven of convenience and comfort.                     "description": "<h1><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Buy TV Price in Nepal</strong></h1><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Buy TV in Nepal from Fatafat Sewa Shop high-quality television at the best price in Lalitpur, Kathmandu, and across the country. ✓TV For Sale ✓Cash on Delivery - Order now. Buy All LED, LCD &amp; Smart TVs in Easy EMI Service in Nepal. Get No Cost EMI service for Television in Nepal.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">LED TVs are the newest sensation and improved versions of LCD TVs, providing you with crisp images and enhanced technological features. Their proprietary dimming technology provides viewers with much more sophisticated color contrast. The vibrant colors and illuminating display enhance your enjoyment of your favorite shows. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Fatafat Sewa</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> offers a wide selection of LED TV brands at discounted prices. LED TVs from top brands such as Hitachi, Sony, Samsung, LG, Videocon, and many more can be ordered and purchased online. We have some of the finest LED TV designs, brands, and sizes, as well as the best LED TV prices in Nepal in 2022. The advantage of purchasing LED TVs is that you can get the same entertainment with balanced color saturation.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">How do I purchase a Television in Nepal?</span></h2><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">In Nepal, you can select from a number of tv brands depending on your needs for consumption. You can choose from a list of the top online tv platforms supplied by Fatafat Sewa to find tv prices in Nepal that suit your preferences. Our website contains more information about it. Cash on delivery is an option for customers in the Kathmandu valley, and we ship goods all around Nepal. </span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);\">Additionally, you can buy the newest smartphones on EMI.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">Fatafat Sewa is a well-known web merchant in Lalitpur with extensive knowledge of tv delivery in Nepal. We offer a wide range of services in Nepal. We put a lot of effort into providing the best delivery we can as the leading tv distributors in Nepal.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">Purchase the TV from top manufacturers at fatafatsewa.com as it is the best online platform for Mobile. background-color: transparent;\">LG TV Price in Nepal</strong></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">LG is the world leader in OLED televisions. The company not only manufactures OLED panels for its televisions, but also sells them to other businesses. It is currently the only company in Nepal that sells OLED televisions. It also sells LCD televisions.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">LG TVs are powered by the company's beloved webOS and include the Magic Remote.</span></p><div class=\"ql-size-large\">Sony is the world's third-largest TV brand, trailing only Samsung and LG. Since then, the company's TV portfolio has grown to include more television.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The majority of Xiaomi's televisions are feature-rich LCD televisions. However, the company has also experimented with OLED and transparent televisions. They are, however, unavailable in Nepal.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">In addition, the company sells Android TV sticks that can transform your old TV into a smart one.</span></p><div class=\"quill-better-table-wrapper\"><table class=\"quill-better-table\"><colgroup><col width=\"100\"><col width=\"100\"></colgroup><tbody><tr data-row=\"1\"><td data-row=\"1\" rowspan=\"1\" colspan=\"1\" data-cell-bg=\"rgb(255, 255, 255)\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);\"><p class=\"qlbt-cell-line\" data-row=\"1\" data-cell=\"1\" data-rowspan=\"1\" data-colspan=\"1\" data-cell-bg=\"rgb(255, 255, 255)\"><strong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Xiaomi Mi TV Model</strong></p></td><td data-row=\"1\" rowspan=\"1\" colspan=\"1\" data-cell-bg=\"rgb(255, 255, 255)\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);\"><p class=\"qlbt-cell-line\" data-row=\"1\" data-cell=\"2\" data-rowspan=\"1\" data-colspan=\"1\" data-cell-bg=\"rgb(255, 255, 255)\"><strong style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Price in Nepal</strong></p></td></tr><tr data-row=\"2\"><td data-row=\"2\" rowspan=\"1\" colspan=\"1\" data-cell-bg=\"rgb(247, 247, 247)\" style=\"background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247);\"><p class=\"qlbt-cell-line\" data-row=\"2\" data-cell=\"1\" data-rowspan=\"1\" data-colspan=\"1\" data-cell-bg=\"rgb(247, 247, 247)\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; Once you have finished adding, move on to checkout. Follow the site's instructions, and you're done. A call of confirmation will shortly reach you. Then, within a few days, your items will be delivered to your area.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">2. Through Fatafat Sewa phone order</strong></h3><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">You can also place your order over the phone if you don't feel like going through all these processes. In order to prevent confusion regarding the product you choose, you must provide comprehensive information about it. Call us at 982875-7575.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">3. Drop by Fatafat sewa store</strong></h3><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent;\">You are welcome to stop by our office at Jhamsikhel Road-3, Lalitpur if you have any remaining questions concerning the goods.
