                {
                    "id": 84,
                    "title": "Vacuum Cleaner",
                    "slug": "vacuum-cleaner-price-in-nepal",
                    "description": "<h1 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Vacuum Cleaner Price in Nepal</span></h1><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">A vacuum cleaner commonly referred to as a vacuum or a hoover, is a machine that creates pressure to take dirt off of surfaces like floors, furniture, and other surfaces. In this article, we are talking about </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">vacuum cleaner price in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">. The price of a vacuum range from as low as NRP. 8,778/- to as high as NRP. 20,776/- where Yasuda 1600 Watt Vacuum Cleaner is the cheapest and Panasonic MC&nbsp;16L Vacuum Cleaner is the most expensive.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Typically, electricity is used to power it. Our lifestyles have become completely dependent on vacuum cleaners. Vacuum cleaners for the home, which come in a variety of sizes, enable you to keep your surroundings clean. If you're in the market for a vacuum cleaner, you should look at the numerous types available, including steam mops, robotic floor cleaners, robotic window cleaners, dry cleaners, wet and dry vacuum cleaners, and hand-held cleaners. These incredibly practical household cleansers make cleaning quick and simple.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h2><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Types of Vacuum Cleaners:</span></h2><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Some of the types of vacuum cleaners are:</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">1. Upright vacuum cleaner</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">One of the earliest, most widely used, and most popular vacuum cleaners are the upright style. It has a simple elegant handle with a tilt and push. The brush is driven by a motor and removes dirt by sucking it up. It works best and most effectively when cleaning large carpeted surfaces.&nbsp;</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">2. Stick vacuum cleaner</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">A stick model is simple to clean, lightweight, and thin. It features a straightforward design that makes it simple to store and is shaped like a broom. The stick and motor are together, and the motor performs gentle suction. This kind is useful for managing tight areas and furnishings.&nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">3. Canister vacuum cleaner</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">A long wand and cylinder-shaped gadget are joined by a flexible suction hose in a canister type. It has a dust-gathering container and is motor-powered. It can clean a variety of surfaces, including carpeted areas, hard floors, wooden floors, tiles, ceilings, corners, and upholstery.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">4. Handheld vacuum cleaner</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">It is a compact, lightweight vacuum cleaner that may be used for cleaning while on the road. It comes in a variety of designs; some have cords. Some have a spinning brush. It is used to clean confined spaces that are too small or too challenging to access, such as the interiors of cars, tables, stairs, and corners.</span></p><h3><br></h3><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">5. Robotic vacuum cleaner</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">It is a sensor-powered automatic type of vacuum cleaner. Since there is no moving involved, it requires little effort. Through the use of remote control, the settings are selected and the commands are entered, after which the cleaner can work independently. It is helpful for cleaning wood, tile, and carpeted surfaces, as well as corners.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">How do I purchase a Vacuum Cleaner in Nepal?</span></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\">In Nepal, you can choose from a number of vacuum cleaners depending on your usage demands. Visit our website for a selection of vacuum cleaners from various brands if you want to buy a vacuum or other accessories. It is currently offered in FatafatSewa for a reasonable price.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The best service-oriented shopping website and a&nbsp;well-known online retailer in Lalitpur,&nbsp;Nepal is Fatafatsewa, a one-stop shop.&nbsp;Additionally, FatafatSewa offers a free EMI service. At Fatafat Sewa, you may purchase a vacuum cleaner with EMI Service.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">1. Through Fatafat Sewa Phone order</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">You can buy the Vacuum cleaner or other brand products either by a phone call at 9828757575 or by placing your order. If you have any confusion in the process you can immediately make a call.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">2. Through the Fatafat Sewa Website</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">You can visit our website Fatafatsewa and make an online purchase.                 {
                    "id": 97,
                    "title": "Air Cooler",
                    "slug": "air-cooler-price-in-nepal",
                    "description": "<h1><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Air Cooler Price in Nepal</span></h1><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Air coolers have become an essential appliance in many households, especially in regions with hot and dry climates like Nepal. With their efficient cooling capabilities and affordability, air coolers provide a viable alternative to air conditioners. In this article, we will explore the various aspects of air coolers in Nepal, including their types, factors to consider when buying, popular brands, price ranges, and the best options available in the market.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Introduction</span></h2><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Air coolers, also known as evaporative coolers, are devices that use the natural process of evaporation to cool the air. They work by drawing in warm air from the surroundings, passing it through a cooling pad saturated with water, and then blowing out cool air. This process creates a refreshing and comfortable environment, making air coolers popular among households in Nepal.</span></p><h2><br></h2><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Types of Air Coolers</span></h2><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">There are several types of air coolers available in the market, each catering to different needs and preferences.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Desert Coolers</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Desert coolers are large-capacity air coolers suitable for cooling larger spaces like living rooms or offices. They have a higher cooling capacity and a larger water tank capacity, allowing them to provide effective cooling for extended periods.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Personal Air Coolers</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Personal air coolers, also known as room coolers, are compact and portable. They are designed to cool smaller areas such as bedrooms or study rooms. These coolers are ideal for individual use and are more energy-efficient compared to desert coolers.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Tower Air Coolers</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Tower air coolers are tall and sleek, designed to fit in narrow spaces. They provide powerful and efficient cooling while occupying minimal floor space. Tower coolers are suitable for both small and medium-sized rooms.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Factors to Consider When Buying an Air Cooler</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">When purchasing an air cooler in Nepal, several factors should be taken into consideration to ensure you make the right choice.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Cooling Capacity</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The cooling capacity of an air cooler determines its effectiveness in cooling a given area. It is measured in cubic meters per hour (m³/h). Consider the size of the room or space you intend to cool and choose an air cooler with an appropriate cooling capacity.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Water Tank Capacity</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The water tank capacity determines the duration for which the air cooler can provide continuous cooling without refilling. Larger water tanks are suitable for longer cooling periods, while smaller tanks may require frequent refilling.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Energy Efficiency</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Look for air coolers with energy-efficient features to minimize electricity consumption. Energy-efficient models help reduce your carbon footprint while keeping your energy bills in check.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Noise Level</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Consider the noise level produced by the air cooler, especially if you plan to use it in bedrooms or study areas. Look for models that operate quietly to ensure a peaceful environment.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Portability</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">If you require the flexibility to move the air cooler between different rooms, consider its portability features. Look for lightweight models with caster wheels or handles for easy mobility.</span></p><h2><br></h2><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Popular Air Cooler Brands in Nepal</span></h2><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Several brands offer high-quality air coolers in Nepal. Here are a few popular ones:</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">1. CG - Known for its durable and feature-rich air coolers.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">2. Godrej - Offers a wide range of air coolers with innovative designs.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">3. Sensei - Focuses on energy-efficient and environmentally friendly air coolers.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">4. Crompton - Provides reliable and efficient cooling solutions.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Air Cooler Price Range in Nepal</span></h2><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The price of air coolers in Nepal can vary depending on factors such as brand, size, features, and cooling capacity. Here's a breakdown of the price ranges:</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Budget-friendly Options</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Budget-friendly air coolers in Nepal generally range from NPR 5,000 to NPR 10,000. These models offer basic features and are suitable for small rooms or personal use.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Mid-range Options</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Mid-range air coolers fall within the price range of NPR 10,000 to NPR 20,000. They offer more advanced features, larger cooling capacities, and better build quality.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Premium Options</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Premium air coolers in Nepal can cost NPR 20,000 and above. These models come with premium features, superior cooling capacities, and advanced technologies for optimal cooling performance.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Best Air Coolers in Nepal</span></h2><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Based on customer reviews and expert recommendations, here are some of the best air coolers available in Nepal:</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">CG 70 Ltrs. Desert Air Cooler</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- IOT Enabled</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Water Tank Capacity: 70 L</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Wattage: 185 W</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Honeycomb Cooling Pads</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Touch Panel</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Thermal Overload Protection</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Smart Humidity Control</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Remote Control</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Warranty: 1 Year Comprehensive (Excluding Plastic Parts)</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">70 Ltrs. Desert Air Cooler</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Water Tank Capacity: 70 L</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Wattage: 185 W</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Touch Panel</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Special Honeycomb Pads</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- High Cooling Technology</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Quadra Flow Technology</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Huge Water Tank</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Remote Control</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Warranty: 1 Year Comprehensive (Excluding Plastic Parts)</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">55 Ltrs. Desert Air Cooler</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Water Tank Capacity: 55 L</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Wattage: 200 W</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Honeycomb Pads</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- N-Dura Super Motor</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Quadra Flow Technology</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Huge Water Tank</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Easy Mobility</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Inverter Compatible</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Touch Panel</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Remote Control</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">- Warranty: 1 Year Comprehensive (Excluding Plastic Parts)</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Conclusion</span></h2><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Air coolers offer an energy-efficient and cost-effective solution for cooling in Nepal's hot and dry climate. When buying an air cooler, consider factors such as cooling capacity, water tank capacity, energy efficiency, noise level, and portability. Popular air cooler brands in Nepal include CG, Godrej, Sensei, and Crompton. Depending on your budget and requirements, you can choose from budget-friendly, mid-range, or premium options. Enjoy the refreshing and comfortable environment provided by air coolers while staying within your budget.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">FAQs</span></h2><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">1. Can air coolers be used in humid regions like Nepal?</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> - Yes, air coolers can be used in humid regions, but their effectiveness may be reduced compared to dry climates.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">2. How often should I clean my air cooler?</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> - It is recommended to clean the air cooler at least once every two weeks to maintain its efficiency and prevent the build-up of bacteria or mold.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">3. Can I use an air cooler with an inverter during power cuts?</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> - Yes, many air coolers are compatible with inverters, allowing you to use them during power outages.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">4. Do air coolers require a lot of water?</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> - The water consumption of air coolers varies depending on the model and usage. However, they are generally designed to be water-efficient.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">5. Can I use air coolers outdoors?</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> - While air coolers are primarily designed for indoor use, certain models can be used in outdoor spaces with proper ventilation and protection from direct sunlight and rain.</span></p>",
                    "parent_id": 66,
                    "status": 1,
                    "featured": 0,
                    "order": 0,
                    "category_full_name": "TV & Home Appliances / Air Cooler",

                {
                    "id": 98,
                    "title": "OVEN",
                    "slug": "oven-price-in-nepal",
                    "description": "<h1><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Oven price in Nepal</span></h1><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Oven Price in Nepal: Top 5 Ovens to Enhance Your Cooking Experience</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Introduction:</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Ovens are important tools in kitchens today. Changing the way we cook and they come in different types. We will talk about the best ones in Nepal. These ovens have great features. Here we will get to know oven prices in Nepal. Let's find the perfect oven for your kitchen.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Types of Ovens</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">There are different types of ovens convection ovens, microwave ovens, toaster ovens, and OTG ovens. Each type is good for different kinds of cooking.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Overview of Oven Brands in Nepal</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Nepal's market is filled with a wide range of oven brands.Some popular oven brands in Nepal are known for being reliable and liked by customers.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">CG: CG is a trusted brand that offers a diverse range of home appliances, including ovens. Known for their durability and quality, CG ovens have gained popularity among Nepalese households.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Black+Decker: Black+Decker is a well-established brand recognized for its innovative kitchen appliances. Their ovens are equipped with advanced features to enhance cooking efficiency and convenience.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Midea: Midea is a global brand renowned for its cutting-edge technology and modern designs. Midea ovens combine functionality with aesthetics, providing a delightful cooking experience.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Elica:Elica is a brand that makes fancy and high-quality ovens. People who love cooking really like their ovens because they look nice and work well.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Top 5 Ovens in Nepal</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Now, let's explore the top 5 ovens available in Nepal that have garnered excellent reviews and ratings from users:</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">\"38L OTG Oven MC38E-LR0ZE\":</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Capacity: 38 liters</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Power Consumption: 1500 Watts</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Cooking Modes: Bake, Grill, and Toast</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Key Features: Temperature control, Timer, Rotisserie function</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">\"32L OTG Oven MC32A-LR0ZE\":</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Capacity: 32 liters</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Power Consumption: 1300 Watts</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Cooking Modes: Bake, Grill, and Toast</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Key Features: Temperature control, Timer, Convection fan</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">\"25L OTG Oven MC25C-LR0ZE\":</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Capacity: 25 liters</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Power Consumption: 1200 Watts</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Cooking Modes: Bake, Grill, and Toast</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Key Features: Temperature control, Timer, Rotisserie function</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">\"Electric Oven 45 Ltrs. CGOTG4502C\":</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Capacity: 45 liters</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Power Consumption: 2000 Watts</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Cooking Modes: Bake, Grill, and Toast</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Key Features: Temperature control, Timer, Convection fan, Interior light</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">\"70L Double Glass Toaster Oven TRO70RDG-B5\":</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Capacity: 70 liters</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Power Consumption: 2400 Watts</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Cooking Modes: Bake, Grill, Toast, and Rotisserie</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Key Features: Temperature control, Timer, Double-layered glass door</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">\"70L Electric Oven EPBI 1161 MTC BK\":</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Capacity: 70 liters</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Power Consumption: 2400 Watts</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Cooking Modes: Bake, Grill, Toast, and Rotisserie</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Key Features: Temperature control, Timer, Convection fan</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Features and Specifications of Each Oven</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Let's delve deeper into the features and specifications of each of these top-rated ovens:</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">\"38L OTG Oven MC38E-LR0ZE\":</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">With a generous capacity of 38 liters, this oven provides ample space for cooking large meals.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The 1500 Watts power consumption ensures efficient cooking performance.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">This oven can bake, grill, and toast, so you can try different recipes. You can control the temperature and set a timer to cook your food just right.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">\"32L OTG Oven MC32A-LR0ZE\":</span></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">It operates on 1300 Watts of power, delivering consistent cooking results.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The baking, grilling, and toasting modes provide flexibility for various cooking needs.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The temperature control feature ensures accurate heat settings, enabling you to achieve perfect bakes every time.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The inclusion of a convection fan ensures even heat distribution, resulting in evenly cooked meals.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">\"25L OTG Oven MC25C-LR0ZE\":</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Ideal for small families or individuals, this 25-liter capacity oven offers compactness without compromising functionality.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">This oven uses 1200 Watts of power, which is good for saving energy and cooking food well. It has modes for baking, grilling, and toasting, so you can make different recipes. The temperature control helps you cook food at the right temperature for tasty results.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The rotisserie function adds versatility, allowing you to prepare succulent and evenly cooked roasted dishes.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">\"Electric Oven 45 Ltrs. CGOTG4502C\":</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">With a spacious capacity of 45 liters, this electric oven is suitable for larger families or those who love to entertain guests.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">It operates on 2000 Watts of power, providing quick and efficient cooking results.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The baking, grilling, and toasting modes offer versatility for different cooking preferences.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The temperature control feature and timer allow you to set precise cooking times and temperatures for optimal results.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The inclusion of a convection fan ensures uniform heat distribution, resulting in evenly baked and grilled dishes.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">\"70L Double Glass Toaster Oven TRO70RDG-B5\":</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Boasting an impressive 70-liter capacity, this double glass toaster oven is perfect for large families and those who enjoy hosting gatherings.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">It consumes 2400 Watts of power, ensuring fast and efficient cooking performance.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">In addition to baking, grilling, and toasting, this oven also features a rotisserie function, expanding your cooking possibilities.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The temperature control and timer allow precise adjustments to achieve the desired cooking results.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The double-layered glass door retains heat effectively while providing a clear view of your culinary masterpieces.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">\"70L Electric Oven EPBI 1161 MTC BK\":</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">With a capacity of 70 liters, this electric oven is spacious enough to handle cooking for large families and special occasions.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">It operates on 2400 Watts of power, delivering fast and efficient cooking results.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The baking, grilling, toasting, and rotisserie modes provide versatility for various cooking preferences.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The temperature control feature ensures accurate heat settings, allowing you to achieve perfect bakes and delicious grilled dishes.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The inclusion of a convection fan ensures even heat distribution, resulting in uniform cooking and browning.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Price Range and Affordability</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">When it comes to purchasing an oven, budget considerations play a crucial role. The prices of ovens in Nepal vary based on brand, features, and capacity. The top 5 ovens mentioned above range from NPR 10,000 to NPR 30,000, providing options for different budget ranges. It is important to assess your cooking needs and allocate a budget accordingly. Remember, investing in a quality oven can enhance your cooking experience and save you time in the long run.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Performance and User Reviews</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">To gain a better understanding of each oven's performance, it's valuable to consider user feedback and ratings. Users have praised the top 5 ovens for their reliability, efficiency, and ease of use. Many have expressed satisfaction with the even cooking results, consistent temperatures, and durability of these appliances. However, it's essential to read multiple reviews and consider your own specific requirements before making a decision.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Buying Guide and Considerations</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Before making a purchase, it's important to consider several factors to ensure you select the oven that best suits your needs:</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Capacity: Evaluate your cooking requirements and choose an oven with an appropriate capacity to accommodate your meals.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Cooking Modes: Determine the cooking modes you will use most frequently and select an oven that offers those features.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Power Consumption: Consider energy efficiency and select an oven that strikes a balance between performance and power consumption.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Size and Space: Measure your kitchen space and ensure the oven you choose fits well within your kitchen layout.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Brand and Warranty: Opt for reputable brands known for their quality and reliability. Check the warranty terms to ensure you are protected in case of any issues.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">User Reviews: Read reviews from verified buyers to gain insights into real-life experiences with the oven models you are considering.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Budget: Set a budget range based on your requirements and explore options within that range.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Remember, choosing the right oven will enhance your cooking experience, so take your time, do thorough research, and make an informed decision.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Maintenance and Care Tips</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">To ensure the longevity and optimal performance of your oven, follow these maintenance and care tips:</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Regular Cleaning: Clean the oven regularly, both inside and outside, to remove food residues and maintain hygiene.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Avoid Harsh Chemicals: Use mild detergents or oven-specific cleaners for cleaning. Avoid abrasive cleaners that may damage the oven's surfaces.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Remove Spills Promptly: If any spills occur during cooking, clean them immediately to prevent staining or odor buildup.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Inspect and Replace Parts: Regularly check the oven's heating elements, knobs, and seals. Replace any faulty or worn-out parts promptly.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Follow Manufacturer's Instructions: Adhere to the manufacturer's guidelines for usage, maintenance, and safety to ensure the oven's longevity.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">By following these maintenance and care tips, you can enjoy the optimal performance and durability of your oven for years to come.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Conclusion</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Choosing the right oven for your kitchen is a significant decision that can enhance your culinary endeavors. In this article, we explored the top 5 ovens available in Nepal, highlighting their features, specifications, and affordability. From CG to Black+Decker, Midea to Elica, these brands offer a range of options to suit different cooking needs and budgets. Remember to consider factors such as capacity, cooking modes, power consumption, and user reviews when making your decision. Invest in an oven that aligns with your requirements, and unlock a world of delicious possibilities in your kitchen.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Check out this: https://bit.ly/J_Umma</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">FAQs</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">1. What is the difference between an OTG oven and a convection oven?</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">An OTG oven can do baking, grilling, and toasting. A convection oven has a fan and exhaust system that makes the heat circulate faster, so food cooks evenly. Convection ovens are good for baking, roasting, and broiling.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">2. Can I use an oven for baking and grilling simultaneously?</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Some ovens can bake and grill at the same time. This is helpful when making dishes like lasagna or casseroles.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">3. Are these ovens suitable for commercial use?</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">While the mentioned ovens are primarily designed for household use, some models may be suitable for light commercial use. If you require an oven for commercial purposes, it is advisable to explore commercial-grade options specifically designed to handle high-volume cooking.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">4. How often should I clean my oven?</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Regular cleaning is essential to maintain the performance and hygiene of your oven. Aim to clean your oven at least once a month, or more frequently if you notice excessive food spills or residues.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">5. Are these ovens energy-efficient?</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The way an oven is designed and insulated, and how much power it uses, affects how energy efficient it is. Modern ovens try to save energy, but it's a good idea to check the energy ratings before buying one.</span></p>",

        {
            "id": 74,
            "title": "Drone",
            "slug": "drone-price-in-nepal",
            "description": "<h1><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Drone Price in Nepal</span></h1><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">An unmanned aircraft is referred to as a drone. That device is capable of flight without a human pilot. Its flight path is predetermined by software or managed remotely. In this article, we are talking about D</span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">rone Price in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">If you are looking for Drones at a budget Price in Nepal then you should consider buying DJI drones. DJI</span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(32, 33, 34);\">&nbsp;is a Chinese technology company that manufactures varieties of commercial Drones. There's no doubt that DJI drones satisfy the needs of the users. DJI drones come with varieties of models and one can find the perfect model at a great price in Nepal. The </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(32, 33, 34);\">DJI Drone prices in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(32, 33, 34);\"> range from as low as NPR</span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(32, 33, 36);\"> 20,500 </span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(32, 33, 34);\">to as high as NPR 28,60,000 where DJI Tello Boost Combo is the cheapest and DJI Phantom 4 RTK SDK is the most expensive.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">DJI Drone Shop Near Me</strong></h2><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">The official importer of the </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">DJI products in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\"> is IMS Group. Where as </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Fatafat Sewa </strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">is the officially selling DJI drones in Nepal. Fatafat Sewa provide you the official and genuine DJI products in Nepal. There is no dout that Fatafat Sewa is the officail DJI store in Nepal.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Visit our website, fatafatsewa.com, and go through the drone category if you're seeking any drones. You may purchase top brands like DJI, </span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);\">Autel Robotics</span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">, FIMI, JJRC, Momax, Power vision, and many others from Fatafat Sewa at affordable prices. You may buy whatever you need from Fatafat Sewa, the best online shopping site. Without any difficulty, Fatafat Sewa will deliver the products you choose to your home with the option of paying with cash when they arrive.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">How do I purchase a Drone in Nepal?</strong></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Frist you need to conduct further research to get the ideal drone for your unique needs. Since the popularity of drones has skyrocketed, there are now many various varieties of drones that can be bought. This is wonderful news for those who want their own personal tiny aircraft because you can be sure to find one that satisfies your requirements.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">If you just follow these simple steps, you can simply buy the product.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><br></h3><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">1. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">Through the Fatafat Sewa website</strong></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">By choosing the item you desire and adding it to your basket, you can finish the transaction. After adding is complete, proceed to checkout. You just need to follow the directions on the website. You will soon receive a confirmation call in the mail. Your things will thereafter be delivered to your location in a short period of time.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h3><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">2. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">Through Fatafat Sewa's phone call</strong></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">If you don't feel like going through all these steps, it is just a phone call away. You can also place your order over the phone. You must provide thorough information on the product you choose in order to avoid confusion. Dial </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">9828757575</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"> to reach us.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3><br></h3><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">3.</span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\"> Drop by the Fatafat sewa store</strong></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">If you have any further inquiries about the products, feel free to visit our office at Sitapaila, Kathmandu.         {
            "id": 34,
            "title": "Cameras",
            "slug": "dslr-camera-price-in-nepal",
            "description": "<h1><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">DSLR Camera Price in Nepal</span></h1><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The DSLR is the digital equivalent of the analog SLR (Single Lens Reflex) camera. Due to their variety of features and capacity to generate images of a professional caliber, DSLRs have been among the most widely used camera types for the past 15 years. In this article, we will be learning about </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">dslr camera price in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"> with their types.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><a href=\"https://fatafatsewa.com/shop?category=cameras\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"><img src=\"https://lh5.googleusercontent.com/S-3DCIDNbb3tgoNk2qyBH8f4l-RQ2YVXU2sTzsjmcH4F7OwaNj6yU6xKA9B9T8Wv0IRK63cEHaqll-afps71Ck-rHVcZV8LVLLjbl7jkVVU01VBfh45TRPVJV8D5da20-Kdrnlab5Au6PmnYqB5OF1v1si6yxt78i7Gbz0uZjQMkLVhBVEvx9iU7nsRZGA\" height=\"468\" width=\"624\"></a></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">A DSLR is created by a number of factors. First of all, it only employs one interchangeable lens. As long as the appropriate lens is utilized, this enables you to record any kind of situation. Second, the camera body contains a mechanical mirror system. The photographer can see the light and scene through the viewfinder thanks to a condenser lens and a pentaprism or pentamirror.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><br></h2><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Types of DSLR Cameras in Nepal</span></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Full-frame and crop sensor DSLR cameras come in two different varieties. The size of the image sensor is the only distinction between them.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h3><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h3><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">1. Full-Frame Sensor Camera</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">In terms of DSLR cameras, a full-frame sensor camera has the largest type of camera sensor. Comparable in size to a single slide of 35mm film. Images with a full-frame sensor have a higher resolution than those taken with a crop-sensor camera. Comparatively, the quality and resolution of your photographs are impacted by the sensor size, which has an effect on the level of detail. The number of pixels a sensor can hold increases with size. It will therefore have a better resolution as a result. You can catch more of the scene's details if your resolution is higher.&nbsp;</span></p><h3><br></h3><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">2. Crop Sensor Camera</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">A DSLR with a sensor that is smaller than a full frame is known as a crop sensor model. Crop sensors come in a few different sizes. The most popular sizes are Canon's 22.2x14.8mm and Nikon's 23.6x15.7mm. There is less physical space for pixels on a smaller sensor. Lower resolution results from fewer pixels. As a result, when professional photographers wish to produce photographs of a better caliber, they frequently choose full-frame camera systems.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><br></h2><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Types of DSLR Camera Brands available in Nepal</span></h2><p><br></p><h3><br></h3><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">1. Canon camera price in Nepal</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">One of the most well-known and well-liked brands of cameras in Nepal is Canon.                     "id": 103,
                    "title": "DSLR Camera",
                    "slug": "dslr-camera",
                    "description": "<p>Our wide range of DSLR camera catalog showcases some of the best photography tools for both enthusiasts and professionals. With models like the Canon EOS 90D, Nikon D5600, and Nikon Z series, we provide a range of cameras that deliver exceptional image quality, robust performance, and advanced features. Whether you’re a beginner looking for an entry-level DSLR or a seasoned photographer seeking pro-level control and versatility, this catalog covers it all. Each DSLR is equipped with high-resolution sensors, fast autofocus systems, and durable build quality, making them perfect for capturing everything from stunning landscapes to fast-action shots.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p>",

        {
            "id": 92,
            "title": "PC Components",
            "slug": "pc-components-price-in-nepal",
            "description": "<h1><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">PC Components Price in Nepal 2023</strong></h1><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Looking for the latest prices of PC components in Nepal in 2023? Look no further! We have compiled a list of the current prices of some of the most popular PC components in Nepal to help you make an informed decision when building your dream computer.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">CPU Price in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\">: </span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The prices of CPUs in Nepal vary depending on the brand and model. For example, the Intel Core i9-12900K costs around NPR 95,000, while the AMD Ryzen 9 5950X costs around NPR 105,000.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Motherboard Price in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\">: </span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">A good motherboard is crucial for any PC build. In Nepal, the prices of motherboards range from NPR 8,000 to NPR 30,000, depending on the brand and features.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">RAM Price in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\">: </span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The prices of RAM in Nepal have remained relatively stable over the years. A 16GB DDR4 RAM kit costs around NPR 15,000, while a 32GB DDR4 RAM kit costs around NPR 30,000.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">GPU Price in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\">: </span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The prices of GPUs have skyrocketed in recent years due to high demand from PUBG Gamers. A mid-range GPU like the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060 Ti costs around NPR 170,000, while a high-end GPU like the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3080Ti costs around NPR 300,000.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Storage Price in Nepal: </strong></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">There are many options available when it comes to storage, from HDDs to SSDs. A 1TB SSD costs around NPR 15,000, while a 2TB HDD costs around NPR 8,000.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Power Supply Price in Nepal: </strong></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">A good quality power supply is essential for any PC build. In Nepal, the prices of power supplies range from NPR 5,000 to NPR 25,000, depending on the brand and wattage.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">If you're planning to build a PC in Nepal, you may be concerned about the high costs of PC components. However, there's good news - Fatafat Sewa, a popular electronics retailer in Nepal, offers an EMI service that allows you to pay for your PC components in installments.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">With Fatafat Sewa's EMI service, you can purchase your desired PC components and pay for them in easy monthly installments, making it more affordable to build your dream computer. The EMI service is available for a wide range of products, including CPUs, motherboards, RAM, GPUs, storage devices, and power supplies.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">To use Fatafat Sewa's EMI service, you will need to have a credit card from a partner bank, including Kumari Bank, Standard Chartered, Nabil Bank, and Nepal Investment Mega Bank, Citizens Bank, Siddarth Bank, Prabhu Bank, NIC Asia Bank, Machhapuchhre Bank, NMB Bank &amp; Sanima Banks. You can choose from various EMI plans, ranging from 3 to 18 months, depending on the product and your budget.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Apart from the EMI service, Fatafat Sewa also offers a wide range of PC components from top brands such as Intel, AMD, Ryzen, NVIDIA, ASUS, Gigabyte, and Corsair, at competitive prices. Fatafat also provides free delivery and installation services for our customers.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">In conclusion, if you're looking for an affordable way to build a PC in Nepal, Fatafat Sewa's EMI service can be a great option. With their range of PC components and convenient EMI plans, you can build your dream PC without breaking the bank.</span></p>",

                {
                    "id": 86,
                    "title": "SSD",
                    "slug": "ssd-price-in-nepal",
                    "description": "<h1><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">SSD Price in Nepal</strong></h1><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">If you're looking to upgrade your computer's storage in Nepal, SSDs (Solid State Drives) are a popular choice due to their fast read and write speeds. Here are some prices of SSDs in Nepal as of 2023:</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Kingston A400 SSD: The Kingston A400 is an entry-level SSD that offers good performance at an affordable price. A 240GB Kingston A400 SSD costs around NPR 7,000, while a 480GB Kingston A400 SSD costs around NPR 11,500.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Samsung 970 EVO Plus NVMe SSD: The Samsung 970 EVO Plus is a high-end SSD that offers blazing fast read and write speeds. A 500GB Samsung 970 EVO Plus NVMe SSD costs around NPR 23,000, while a 1TB Samsung 970 EVO Plus NVMe SSD costs around NPR 39,000.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">WD Blue SN550 NVMe SSD: The WD Blue SN550 is a mid-range SSD that offers good performance and value for money. A 500GB WD Blue SN550 NVMe SSD costs around NPR 13,000, while a 1TB WD Blue SN550 NVMe SSD costs around NPR 23,000.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Crucial MX500 SSD: The Crucial MX500 is a popular SSD that offers good performance and reliability. A 500GB Crucial MX500 SSD costs around NPR 13,000, while a 1TB Crucial MX500 SSD costs around NPR 23,000.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Please note that the prices mentioned above are estimated and may vary depending on the retailer, location, and availability of the SSDs. However, these prices can give you a general idea of what to expect when purchasing an SSD in Nepal in 2023.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Overall, SSDs are becoming increasingly affordable and offer a significant performance boost compared to traditional HDDs. If you're looking to upgrade your computer's storage, an SSD can be a great investment to improve your computer's overall performance and speed.</span></p>",
                    "parent_id": 92,
                    "status": 1,
                    "featured": 1,

                {
                    "id": 87,
                    "title": "Graphics Card",
                    "slug": "graphics-card-price-in-nepal",
                    "description": "<h1><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Computer Graphics Card Online in Nepal At Best Price - Fatafatsewa.com</strong></h1><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Graphic cards are a necessity for every gaming laptop and desktop computer. The introduction of high-definition resolution and motion pictures has made graphics cards extremely popular and a must-have hardware to watch those amazing movies and play those intense games. There’s a great selection of NVIDIA graphics cards in Nepal online at Fatafatsewa.com that you can buy at great prices.</span></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Benefits of Graphic Cards</span></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Graphics cards are graphics processing units that are able to process high-definition pixels of the graphical format that is then displayed on the screen as the intended high-resolution imaging. Graphics card prices in Nepal vary according to the brand and type of gaming graphic card that you’re buying. Leading manufacturers of graphics cards like ASUS offer high-quality products that are designed to glide through the extreme processing required to display the optimal output needed for a great movie or game. Graphics cards go hand in hand with computer RAMs which provide the necessary processing power needed to give an amazing imaging experience. These are components that you will find on your desktops or motherboards and are usually located in an area that is well-ventilated. Most graphics cards come with their own set of fans because of the high level of cooling required to function properly and prevent any damage to sensitive components of the motherboard. Unlike other components found on your motherboard, you can upgrade the graphics card to amp the resolution experience of your computer.</span></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">The large selection of graphics cards online at Fatafatsewa.com is available from some of the top brands in Nepal and you can easily find one that will be a fitting upgrade to your computer. The games that are being released today come with some of the most revolutionary graphics that are surprisingly realistic and highly engaging. The tech needed to play these superb games needs the latest in graphics card technology otherwise you might be stuck with a game that annoys you with lagging and won’t provide you with an exhilarating gaming experience. Computer adapters are also a necessary addition for a great gaming experience since they provide stable power throughout a computer run time and will have it humming smoothly the entire time that you’re gaming or watching movies. So, when you decide to buy these devices you should get some research done on the average graphics card price in Nepal and information about that particular brand’s offering. A simple way to get this hardware and have your research done simultaneously is to get these graphics cards online through Fatafatsewa.com.</span></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><h2><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Shop Graphic Cards Online from Fatafatsewa.com</strong></h2><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Fatafat Sewa Nepal is a popular and reliable online shopping store that offers leading brands at some of the best graphics card prices in Nepal. Easily browse the catalogs and read up on the detailed descriptions of each brand's offering and get all the information you will need to make the right decision for your perfect graphics card.</span></p>",

However, with no-cost EMI services, you can pay for these CPUs in monthly installments without any additional interest charges.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">One such retailer that offers no-cost EMI services for CPUs in Nepal is Fatafat Sewa, a popular online shopping platform. Fatafat Sewa offers a wide range of CPUs from top brands such as Intel and AMD, with various EMI plans ranging from 3 to 18 months.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">To use Fatafat Sewa's no-cost EMI service, you will need to have a credit card from a partner bank, including Standard Chartered, Nabil Bank, and Mega Bank. Once you have selected the CPU of your choice, you can choose the EMI plan that suits your budget and pay for it in easy monthly installments.</span></p>",

        {
            "id": 68,
            "title": "iPad & Tablets",
            "slug": "ipad-price-in-nepal",
            "description": "<h1>Apple iPad Product Price in Nepal | Buy Apple iPad in EMI Service</h1><p><strong>iPad Price in Nepal</strong> varies based on the model and storage options. For 2025, the <strong>iPad 10.2 (9th Gen)</strong> starts at NPR 58,500, while the <strong>iPad 10.9 (10th Gen)</strong> is priced from NPR 78,000. The latest <strong>iPad mini 7th Gen</strong> starts at NPR 92,000, and the <strong>iPad Air 5th Gen</strong> begins at NPR 99,000. The <strong>iPad Pro M4 (2024)</strong>, with advanced features, is available from NPR 175,000. Prices increase for higher storage and cellular models, with top variants like the 13” iPad Pro reaching up to NPR 399,000.</p><p>In this page, we'll explore the current prices of all officially available Apple iPad models in Nepal. While the Nepali market does offer the latest iPads, they tend to arrive a bit later than other regions and at significantly higher prices. You can purchase these iPads from Fatafat Sewa and Fatafat Sewa is Official Resseller in Nepal.</p><p><br></p><h2>Latest iPad Price in Nepal 2025</h2><p>Apple<strong> iPad price in Nepal starting at Rs. 55,000 to Rs. 325,000</strong>. Apple iPad comes with various colors and specifications. Fatafat Sewa makes online shopping more easier and reliable. It offers great deals. You can also buy iPad on EMI.</p><div class=\"quill-better-table-wrapper\"><table class=\"quill-better-table\" style=\"width: 200px;\"><colgroup><col width=\"100\"><col width=\"100\"></colgroup><tbody><tr data-row=\"1\"><td data-row=\"1\" rowspan=\"1\" colspan=\"1\"><p class=\"qlbt-cell-line\" data-row=\"1\" data-cell=\"1\" data-rowspan=\"1\" data-colspan=\"1\">NPR 399,000</p></td></tr></tbody></table></div><p><br></p><h3>Apple iPad Price in Nepal</h3><p><strong>Apple iPad 10.2 (2021, 9th Gen)</strong></p><p>The 10.2-inch iPad from 2021 boasts a Retina display with True Tone technology that adjusts the screen's color based on the surrounding light. Powered by the A13 Bionic chip, it offers a 20% performance increase compared to its predecessor and supports machine learning features like Live Text and Center Stage. While it's an older model, it remains highly functional for daily tasks.</p><p><strong>Key Specifications:</strong></p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Display: 10.2-inch Retina, 2160 x 1620 resolution</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Chipset: A13 Bionic</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Storage: 64GB/256GB</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Cameras: 8MP rear, 12MP front with Center Stage</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Battery: 32.4Wh, 10-hour endurance</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Price in Nepal:</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>64GB, WiFi: NPR 58,500</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>64GB, WiFi + Cellular: NPR 70,000 (Out of stock)</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>256GB, WiFi: NPR 79,500</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>256GB, WiFi + Cellular: NPR 104,900 (Out of stock)</li></ol><p><strong>Apple iPad 10.9 (2022, 10th Gen)</strong></p><p>The 10th Gen iPad marks a major redesign, featuring slimmer bezels and a shift to USB-C. The performance is improved with the A14 Bionic chip, and the front camera supports Center Stage. However, it still only supports the 1st-gen Apple Pencil.</p><p><strong>Key Specifications:</strong></p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Display: 10.9-inch Liquid Retina, 2360 x 1640 resolution</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Chipset: A14 Bionic</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Storage: 64GB/256GB</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Cameras: 12MP rear, 12MP front with Center Stage</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Battery: 28.6Wh</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Price in Nepal:</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>64GB, WiFi: NPR 78,000</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>256GB, WiFi: NPR 99,500</li></ol><p><strong>Apple iPad Mini 7th Gen (2024)</strong></p><p>The latest iPad mini features a 8.3-inch Liquid Retina display and the new A17 Pro chip, providing impressive performance upgrades. It also has 12MP cameras on both the front and rear, capable of 4K video recording.</p><p><strong>Key Specifications:</strong></p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Display: 8.3-inch Liquid Retina, 2266 x 1488 resolution</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Chipset: A17 Pro</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Storage: 128GB/256GB</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Cameras: 12MP rear and front</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Battery: 19.3Wh</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Price in Nepal:</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>128GB, WiFi: NPR 92,000</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>256GB, WiFi: NPR 112,000</li></ol><p><strong>Apple iPad Air 5th Gen (2022)</strong></p><p>With the powerful M1 chip, the 5th Gen iPad Air delivers a performance boost, with up to 60% faster speeds than its predecessor. It also features a 12MP ultra-wide front camera and 5G support, although only the Wi-Fi variant is available in Nepal.</p><p><strong>Key Specifications:</strong></p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Display: 10.9-inch Liquid Retina, 2360 x 1640 resolution</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Chipset: Apple M1</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Storage: 64GB/256GB</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Cameras: 12MP rear, 12MP front with Center Stage</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Battery: 28.6Wh</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Price in Nepal:</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>64GB, WiFi: NPR 99,000</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>256GB, WiFi: NPR 119,000</li></ol><p><strong>Apple iPad Air 6th Gen (2024)</strong></p><p>The 6th Gen iPad Air comes with the M2 chip, a larger storage option (up to 1TB), and better connectivity features like WiFi 6E. This model is available in 11-inch and 13-inch sizes, but the cellular version isn't yet available in Nepal.</p><p><strong>Key Specifications:</strong></p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Display: 11/13-inch IPS, 2360 x 1640 (11”), 2732 x 2048 (13”)</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Chipset: Apple M2</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Storage: 128GB to 1TB</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Cameras: 12MP rear, 12MP front</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Battery: 28.93Wh (11”) / 36.59Wh (13”)</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Price in Nepal:</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>11” (128GB, WiFi): NPR 105,000</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>13” (128GB, WiFi): NPR 141,000</li></ol><p><strong>Apple iPad Pro M2 (2022)</strong></p><p>The iPad Pro M2 (2022) features the powerful M2 chip, offering a 15% boost in CPU performance and a 35% boost in GPU. It also supports Apple Pencil Hover and offers an upgraded camera system.</p><p><strong>Key Specifications:</strong></p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Display: 11-inch (Liquid Retina), 12.9-inch (Liquid Retina XDR)</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Chipset: Apple M2</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Storage: 128GB to 2TB</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Cameras: 12MP primary, 10MP ultrawide rear; 12MP front</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Battery: 28.65Wh (11”) / 40.88Wh (12.9”)</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Price in Nepal:</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>11” (128GB, WiFi): NPR 132,500</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>12.9” (128GB, WiFi): NPR 184,500</li></ol><p><strong>Apple iPad Pro M4 (2024)</strong></p><p>The M4-powered iPad Pro is the most powerful model, featuring a stunning OLED display, the M4 chip, and better performance across the board. It’s the thinnest and lightest iPad Pro yet, but has lost the ultrawide camera from the rear.</p><p><strong>Key Specifications:</strong></p><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Display: 11-inch and 13-inch OLED, 120Hz ProMotion</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Chipset: Apple M4</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Storage: 256GB to 2TB</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Cameras: 12MP rear, 12MP front</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Battery: 31.29Wh (11”) / 38.99Wh (13”)</li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>Price in Nepal:</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>11” (256GB, WiFi): NPR 175,000</li><li data-list=\"bullet\" class=\"ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span>13” (256GB, WiFi): NPR 227,000</li></ol><h3>Conclusion</h3><p>While the prices of Apple iPads in Nepal are considerably higher than in other countries, they are still available for those who can afford them. The Nepali market's pricing is influenced by factors like import taxes and market demand. It’s always advisable to buy from official Apple stores or authorized retailers in Nepal to ensure you get the genuine product along with warranty and after-sales services.</p>",

            "id": 94,
            "title": "Bike & Scooter",
            "slug": "bike-scooter-price-in-nepal",
            "description": "<h1><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Bike &amp; Scooter Prices in Nepal 2025</strong></h1><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Nepal’s market for two-wheelers has been growing rapidly, with a wide range of bikes and scooters available to meet different needs, from daily commuting to adventurous rides. In 2025, consumers in Nepal can choose from petrol-powered, hybrid, and electric models. Here’s an updated guide to help you understand the prices and features of bikes and scooters currently available in Nepal.</span></p><h3><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Popular Scooter Models in Nepal</strong></h3><h4><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">1. Yamaha Aerox 155 BS6</strong></h4><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Price:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> NPR 499,900</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Features:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> A sporty and powerful scooter equipped with advanced BS6-compliant technology, offering a seamless blend of style and performance.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Best For:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Urban commuters seeking speed and reliability.</span></li></ol><h4><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">2. TVS Ntorq RTFI BS6</strong></h4><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Price:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> NPR 309,900</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Features:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Known for its sleek design and smart connectivity features, this scooter offers excellent mileage and a robust engine.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Best For:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Riders looking for a combination of tech-savvy features and affordability.</span></li></ol><h4><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">3. Pure EV Electric Scooters</strong></h4><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Price Range:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> NPR 199,999 to NPR 399,000</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Features:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Eco-friendly, battery-powered scooters with impressive mileage and low maintenance costs.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Best For:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Environmentally conscious riders looking for a budget-friendly alternative.</span></li></ol><h4><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">4. Segway Electric Scooters</strong></h4><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Price Range:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> NPR 260,000 to NPR 390,000</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Features:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Innovative designs with modern technology, offering smooth rides and great performance for city commutes.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Best For:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Tech enthusiasts prioritizing sustainability.</span></li></ol><h3><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Popular Motorcycle Models in Nepal</strong></h3><h4><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">1. Suzuki Gixxer 250</strong></h4><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Price:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> NPR 635,900</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Features:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> A premium motorcycle with a sporty design, powerful engine, and advanced features for enhanced performance.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Best For:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Riders seeking a blend of style and adventure.</span></li></ol><h4><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">2. Honda X-Blade 160</strong></h4><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Price:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> NPR 295,900</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Features:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Designed for urban riders, this bike combines a sleek design with a reliable engine.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Best For:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Daily commuters wanting comfort and efficiency.</span></li></ol><h4><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">3. Royal Enfield Classic 350</strong></h4><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Price:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> NPR 589,000</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Features:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Iconic styling with a robust engine, perfect for long-distance tours and rugged terrain.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Best For:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Riders passionate about heritage and power.</span></li></ol><h3><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Factors Affecting Prices</strong></h3><ol><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Government Policies:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Import taxes and duties heavily influence two-wheeler prices in Nepal.</span></li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Currency Exchange Rates:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Fluctuations in the Nepali Rupee can impact prices of imported models.</span></li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Brand &amp; Model:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Premium brands and models with advanced features naturally cost more.</span></li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Technology:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Electric and hybrid models are often priced higher due to their eco-friendly technology and battery systems.</span></li></ol><h3><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Tips for Buying Two-Wheelers in Nepal</strong></h3><ol><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Assess Your Needs:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Consider your primary use—daily commuting, long-distance touring, or eco-friendly transportation.</span></li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Set a Budget:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Determine how much you’re willing to spend, keeping in mind maintenance and fuel costs.</span></li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Compare Features:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Look for key features such as mileage, engine power, and tech add-ons.</span></li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Explore EMI Options:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Many dealers in Nepal offer 0% EMI schemes, making it easier to purchase high-end models.</span></li><li data-list=\"ordered\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Visit Authorized Dealers:</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> Always buy from authorized dealerships to ensure genuine products and warranties.</span></li></ol><h3><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Conclusion</strong></h3><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Whether you’re eyeing a stylish scooter for city commutes or a powerful bike for long rides, Nepal’s diverse two-wheeler market has something for everyone. With advancements in technology and an increasing focus on sustainability, 2025 promises an exciting year for bike and scooter enthusiasts. Make sure to research thoroughly and choose a model that best fits your lifestyle and budget.</span></p>",
