                {
                    "id": 38,
                    "title": "Scooters",
                    "slug": "scooters-price-in-nepal",
                    "description": "<h1 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Scooters Price in Nepal</span></h1><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">A scooter is a choice if you're seeking short-distance transportation. Are you looking for the best&nbsp;Scooter price in Nepal? In this article, we” ll discuss the latest scooter in Nepal in full detail. Scooters can fit on narrow roads and have great speed because they often weigh less than motorcycles.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">In Nepal, scooters have become very popular. If you've been paying attention to Kathmandu's streets, you must have noticed a significant rise in scooter traffic. People no longer hold the outdated stereotype that scooters are only used by women. According to the current trend, a scooter appears to be the simpler option for today's youth, regardless of gender. Why? affordability, lower fuel consumption, no clutch or gears, easy and comfortable rides, and much more. In addition to being lightweight and simple to ride, it also offers the rider plenty of storage room for their possessions.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">For personal mobility, scooters are chosen over cars in part because they are less expensive, easier to use, and simpler to park and store. Scooter license standards are typically simpler and less expensive than vehicle licensing requirements, and insurance premiums are frequently lower.</span></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h2><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Scooter on EMI Service in Nepal</span></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">If you urgently need a Scooter and do not have a sufficient amount then don’t worry we have EMI service available. EMI is actually an equal quantum of the amount we will have to pay back for the loan or product taken.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">FatafatSewa EMI is a digital lending service to give loans for 3 months, 6 months, 9 months, and 12 months to customers directly through a bank credit card.&nbsp;The client can get excess-free, paperless, and quick loans through FatafatSewa.</span></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h2><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Best Scooters in Nepal (2024)</span></h2><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">1. Honda Grazia scooter price in Nepal</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The newest line of Honda scooters is called Honda Grazia. Other Honda scooters on the market are less powerful than Grazia. It boasts a strong, dependable engine and a trendy, edgy design, which has attracted a lot of attention. Additionally, Grazia is the only scooter in existence to feature an LED headlamp. The bikers have excellent sight thanks to this. This vehicle, which complies with BS-IV emission standards, has a 125cc engine and Honda Eco Technology. The front disc brake, completely digital meter with eco speed indicator, alloy wheels with tubeless tires, telescopic suspension, front glove box with a mobile charging system, and 18-liter under-seat storage are other notable features.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Honda Grazia STD Price in Nepal: 2,21,900/-</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Honda Grazia DLX price in Nepal: 2,41,900/-</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">2. Vespa scooter price in Nepal</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Vespa is the most famous scooter brand in the world. Vespa has long been renowned for its elegant and fashionable appearance. The SXL 150 is one of many variations of the scooter you can buy, and it includes new front styling, new seats, and wider tubeless tires. Additionally, it includes amenities like a USB charger, an under-seat light, and a full-LED headlamp. Other elements include a full steel body finish, a chrome finish, a chrome grab rail, and an optional matte color scheme. A rectangular headlamp with rectangular mirrors is another. All of the classic Vespa characteristics, including sturdy construction, lightweight, quick brakes, and excellent handling dynamics, are present in this scooter. In the city, Vespa is also seen as a fashion statement. Everyone wants to own a Vespa, regardless of gender or age, and it is definitely an elevated scooter.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Vespa Elegante 150 price in Nepal: 4,23,946/-</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Vespa SXL 150 Matte price in Nepal: 4,03,946/-</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Vespa SXL 125 Matte Price in Nepal: 3,49,946/-</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">3. Aprilia Scooter price in Nepal</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Aprilia is established by Albetro Beggio,&nbsp;the Italian motorcycle company in Noale, Italy, immediately following the end of World War II. Prior to moving on to the production of scooters and small-capacity motorbikes, the company started off by making bicycles. This scooter may be used on any kind of road in Nepal.&nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The Aprilia SR 150 has one of the most potent engines in the scooter market in Nepal with a sleek, waspish look. Its sturdy construction and powerful low-speed reaction make it ideal for city traffic. This car handles very well because of its fantastic suspension, 14-inch alloy wheels, and large tires.                     "description": "<h1 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Bike Price in Nepal</span></h1><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Get to know the latest </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">bike price in Nepal </strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">here at Fatafat Sewa. A motorcycle is a two- or three-wheeled motor vehicle. It is also referred to as a motorbike, bike, or cycle. Long-distance travel, commuting, cruising, sport, and off-road riding all require quite diverse motorcycle designs. </span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\"><img src=\"https://lh6.googleusercontent.com/omHFG-FzOeoWLCpRTZDiTwJTakmHkui0ddfH0Afesjf0421_zV00AiVoXZ49DkNv-Fi_KMUaOZaX5TW9yzBT9fVldRWTadP-ecdOv79aE5nbAvTOrfqfivyluIb5OcX93NhceLNaH-83txqUGh1xuWg1HrZe-4aWLKxHWLUXpSSMuHlzlDWtuXiSplE6tA\" height=\"468\" width=\"420\"></span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">There are numerous things to think about when buying a motorbike, whether you're a beginner or an experienced rider looking to improve. You must choose between new and secondhand motorcycles, determine your budget, and find a motorcycle that suits your riding style.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">It's crucial to understand how the bike feels to ride, though. When looking for bikes, we advise you to test drive a variety of motorcycles to determine which is best for you. For your first ride, we've listed our suggestions for nice motorcycles below.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Bike store near Lalitpur</span></h2><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The sort of motorcycle you choose will have a big impact on how much it will cost. But in addition to the motorcycle's price, purchasing a motorcycle comes with a lot of additional expenses. These expenses consist of insurance, riding supplies, and license costs. In Nepal, there are many different types and pricing ranges of bikes ranging from motorcycles with powerful engines or high overall performance.&nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Are you planning to purchase a bike? To achieve this, go to our website, Fatafat Sewa. The cost of the bike is very reasonable. You may get a choice of it online in Nepal thanks to the variety offered by Fatafatsewa.com.</span></p><p><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Brands of Motorcycles available in Nepal</span></h2><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">1. Aprilia&nbsp;</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">One of Piaggio's brands is the Italian motorcycle manufacturer Aprilia. It started out making bicycles before expanding to make scooters and small-capacity motorcycles. Large sportbikes from Aprilia have recently been created, including the 1,000 ccs V-twin RSV Mille and the V4 RSV4. You can get the list of Aprilia bike price in Nepal at Fatafat Sewa.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">2. Yamaha&nbsp;</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Yamaha is a Japanese multinational company that produces motorized items including motorbikes, boats, and outboard motors. Yamaha is the world's second-largest seller of motorcycles, and it also dominates the market for outboard motors and watercraft.&nbsp;You can get the list of Yamaha bike price in Nepal at Fatafat Sewa.</span></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h3><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">3. TVS</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">TVS is a global Indian motorcycle manufacturer with its headquarters in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. It is India's third-largest motorbike manufacturer. Three million units are sold by the corporation each year, and it can produce over four million vehicles each year. You can get the list of TVS bike price in Nepal at Fatafat Sewa. The TVS bike price in Nepal is mentioned on the Fatafat Sewa website.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">4. Suzuki</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Suzuki is a motorbike manufacturer based in Japan. They produce a variety of motorbikes, from street-legal models to off-road machines, and they compete in the MotoGP with the Rizla Suzuki team from the United Kingdom. The GSXR sports bikes sold in Europe are blue and white, which are Suzuki's company colors. Get the most affordable Suzuki bikes in Nepal on EMI service.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">5. Royal Enfield</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">With the production of its first motorcycle beginning in 1901, Royal Enfield is the oldest motorcycle company in the world still in operation. They are most known for developing single- and twin-cylinder bikes, and in 2018, they sold 846,000 units, making them a formidable force. The price of the royal Enfield bike is mentioned on the site.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">6. Although it dates back to 1934, it was founded in 1992. The parent business of the KTM Group today is KTM AG.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">7. Apple Watch Series 8 [GPS 45mm] Smart Watch</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Your indispensable ally in leading a healthy life is now even more potent. By compensating for undesirable motions, DJI's built-in superior stabilization technology captures the moment with cinematic smoothness. magnetically snap in and unfold. As soon as you attach your smartphone to the gimbal, the DJI Mimo app launches. Upgraded ActiveTrack 5.0 maintains your subject in the center of the picture while following them seamlessly. This DJI gimbal is clever and has a variety of simple-to-use shooting guidelines. It has a non-slip coating, stain resistance, and an ergonomic grip that will keep it firmly in your hands.</span></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><h3><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">5. The 31-minute maximum battery life of the DJI Mini 2 provides more than enough time to set up the ideal photo.                             "description": "<h1><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Cable Price list in Nepal</span></h1><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">The function of an electric cable is to move electrical energy from one location to another. Cables can be designed in a variety of ways, always referencing domestic and international rules, depending on their intended use. Volts, the unit of measurement for an electric cable, are used to classify them into one of two groups: Medium voltage cables, high voltage cables, low voltage cables (up to 750 V), and low voltage cables (up to 1,000 V). </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Cable price list in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\"> varies from Rs. 99 to Rs. 2249 at Fatafat sewa.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\"><img src=\"https://lh6.googleusercontent.com/_KWwP3dvrwyrLvERFRHMPoJyBI-Tqh3orHe6c7UWSOcxoeWupxSM8M-vO2f1j7FiA1Ft2cXfF7OK2WsbhMDD-h2WAkqtVXlqaVQe9aaZkVZAr6P1ukYzxhAXdhyHTr-TzEZQvvMQZ_rHWMCANXhCwd0FG5AoaP-xVJyQ_gxF7Czu_URIAgbYQE9w81uugA\" height=\"468\" width=\"624\"></span></p><p><br></p><h2><br></h2><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Types of the electric cable by their use</span></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Here are some of the types of electric cables.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">1. Cables for electric panels</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">These are the flexible cables used for wiring electric cabinets. These electrical cables are best suited for interior wiring of electrical cabinets, switch boxes, and small electrical equipment as well as for residential usage, installation in public spaces, and domestic use.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">2. Power cables</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">These are the energy cables for commercial and industrial buildings. Power cables are frequently used in industrial settings, for variable frequency drives, and for many kinds of low-voltage connections.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">3. Armoured cables</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">These are reinforced with steel or aluminum for locations where there is a chance of mechanical attack. Armoured cables are frequently found in installations in buildings where there is a risk of fire and explosion as well as in locations where rats are present.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">4. Rubber cables</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Extra flexible rubber cables have a wide range of applications. Rubber cables are used in both stationary industrial facilities and mobile services. Rubber sheathing on welding cables is recommended in order to transport high currents between the welding generator and the electrode.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">5. Control cables</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Because they are primarily designed for small home appliances, the connection of manufacturing machine parts, signaling and control systems, the connection of motors or frequency converters, and signal transmission where the voltage induced by an external electromagnetic field may affect the transmitted signal, or power supply connections to prevent electromagnetism, control cables for fixed or mobile installations should be extremely flexible.</span></p><p><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h2><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">How to buy cables in Nepal?</span></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Do you intend to buy a cable for a different purpose?                             "title": "Headphone",
                            "slug": "headphone-price-in-nepal",
                            "description": "<h1><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Affordable Headphones Price In Nepal</span></h1><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">A user wears headphones, which are a pair of small loudspeaker </span><a href=\"https://fatafatsewa.com/category/speaker-price-in-nepal\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">speakers</a><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">, on or near their head over their ears. They function as electroacoustic transducers, converting an electrical signal into an associated sound.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">A set of small speakers known as headphones are used to listen to sound coming from an electronic device such as a computer, music player, or other. One speaker for each ear, joined by a band over the head, made up the first headphones. In comparison to earphones, headphones have a better noise-canceling feature. It has to do with the parts and the microphone that are put inside the headphones. Some headphones also feature noise cancellation filters, which help to block out unpleasant noises and provide crystal-clear audio. In this article, we will talk about headphones prices in Nepal and their types.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Since </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">headphone price in Nepal </strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">varies from models and brands, they’re associated with but at Fatafat you will find market-competitive discount rates on the entire assortment. So, order all your favorite accessories such as earphones, headsets, and more from the best place to do online shopping in Nepal and never miss out. We offer delivery to all the major cities of Nepal including Lalitpur, Kathmandu, Bhaktapur, Chitawan, Pokhara, Biratnagar, and more. For the most variety, and convenience, choose Fatafat! We are delighted to provide you with the best online shopping experience!</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Types Of Headphones In Nepal</span></h2><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">1. MDR-ZX110 Wired On-Ear Headphones</span></h3><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">With SONY® ZX-Series Monitor headphones, maximizing your audio experience has never been simpler. There is no need to compromise when something is built with comfort and performance in mind.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Enjoy a full, balanced audio experience from 12 to 22,000 Hz with a rich, full-frequency response from 30 mm speaker units.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">2. Apple EarPods Headphones with 3.5mm Plug</span></h3><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The shape of the EarPods is determined by the geometry of the ear, which makes them more comfortable for more people than other earbud-style headphones. This is in contrast to conventional, circular earbuds.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">You hear high-quality music because the speakers inside the EarPods were designed to enhance sound output and reduce sound loss. The EarPods also have a built-in remote that you can use to answer or finish conversations, change the music and video playback controls, and adjust the volume with a pinch of the cable.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">3. Harman Kardon FLY Noise-Canceling Wireless Over-Ear Headphones</span></h3><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">With these FLY Noise-Canceling Wireless Over-Ear Headphones from Harman Kardon, you can concentrate on your music in noisy surroundings. The 40mm drivers of the FLY headphones, which are optimized with Harman Kardon's unique sound, play back your music. Active noise cancellation technology continuously filters out background noise so that you only hear your audio and nothing else.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">You may listen for up to 20 hours on a full charge, and if you're in a rush, you can receive up to 2.5 hours of playback on just 15 minutes of charging. The FLY headphones also feature an inbuilt microphone for making hands-free calls or interacting with a mobile device's digital assistant. Both Alexa and Google Assistant are built-in with these wireless headphones.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">How do I purchase Headphones in Nepal?</span></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Looking to buy accessories online in Nepal? Shop online from Fatafat, the best place to do online shopping in Nepal. Here you can find headphones, Neckbands of your choice from the best brands. Fatafat lets you compare headphones, Neckbands prices in Nepal, specs, features, and brands before you shop for headphones &amp; Neckbands online from fatafatsewa.com. When you are looking to shop earphones, Neckbands, Bluetooth Speakers, and other accessories online, you will come across a large number of popular earphones, headphones, neckbands, and earbuds brands on Fatafat such as Anker, Sony, WK Design, Lenovo, Remax, JBL, Purple, HOCO, bOat, and many more.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">If you’re up for shopping for Bluetooth headphones also look no further than Fatafat as we're offering the best price headphones in Nepal.                             "id": 28,
                            "title": "Earbud",
                            "slug": "earbud-price-in-nepal",
                            "description": "<h1><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Earbuds Price in Nepal</span></h1><p><br></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Earbuds are usually small pairs of speakers that you wear inside your ears. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Earbuds price in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"> completely depends upon the brand,&nbsp;sound</span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(32, 33, 36);\"> quality,&nbsp;battery life,&nbsp;right ear-tips and controls,&nbsp;Noise cancellation, and good charging case </span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">of the product.&nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"><img src=\"https://lh5.googleusercontent.com/eyXkev4zIdE0NLxqgoleLIkjlrMBC1-ZRUjaNBZAIPBSAi3bi2lGVKQj_xyjeEfm8aL9yGYODk4Nn-elbU0SYMVMWDw33ZRffRYD1cVMJpBxrAv0njKpa_mg4-G-bWE3S0XXhRdYyHL6p3dDhsM7uJ1r3WMdH4Yl_j1PYbd1GkBp0WlsgzThKjTGxJVMcg\" height=\"468\" width=\"624\" style=\"display: block; margin: auto;\"></span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The days of just having the option of big, awkward-to-transport headphones are over. The way we view earbuds' purpose has changed as a result of technological invention. They can be neatly packed in a case and are designed to fit the ears well in both formal and relaxed situations.</span></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Types of Earbuds in Nepal</span></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">We can help if you're having trouble selecting which type is ideal for you. Here are the many categories of headphones.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">1. Over-ear headphones&nbsp;</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The most popular kind of headphones with ear pads big enough to wrap around your full ear are over-ear models. They have a headband that joins two ear cups and is the largest in size. Over-ear headphone produces realistic sound and is by far its best feature.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">2. On-ear </span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">headphones</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">In comparison to over-ear headphones, the on-ear fit and overall lightweight construction provide improved stability during vigorous activity. They are a little bit lighter to carry about because of their reduced size. The most portable type of full-sized headphones is the on-ear model.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">3. True wireless earbuds</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Because they have no wires whatsoever, real wireless earbuds (also known as true wireless headphones) are very popular. They come with a charging case that makes them portable and increases the life of their battery. Therefore, regardless of the source, wireless earbuds produce the same sound.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The top Brands of Earbuds available in Nepal</span></h2><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">FatafatSewa has Earbuds from brands such as Anker, Hifuture, AQFIT, REMAX, OnePlus, and OPPO. Time and often we have exciting offers and schemes for earbuds. Grab the best opportunities to buy a machine from FatafatSewa Online and get it delivered.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">1. Anker Price in Nepal</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Our top pick for shoppers on a tight budget is the Anker Soundcore Life Note True wireless earbuds, which are a worthy upgrade from the company's wildly successful Soundcore Life Note model. The buds combine well-balanced music, effective noise cancellation, and a best-in-class companion. The price of Anker Soundcore Life Note-True Wireless Earbuds is Rs.4999.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">2.</span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\"> HiFuture Price in Nepal</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The greatest option for modern devices that have the power to turn attention is HiFuture. There is always something on the list for everyone, so even if you are not a big fan of gadgets, you won't be let down. The price of HiFuture Tidybuds TWS Earbuds is Rs. 3,999.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">3. OPPO Price in Nepal</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Electronics producer OPPO Electronics Corporation is situated in China's Guangdong province in the city of Dongguan. The Oppo Enco W11 is a fantastic option to think about if you're looking for good earphones that offer good sound and call quality while being comfortable and having a great design. Price of Oppo Enco W11is Rs. 3,999.</span></p><p><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">How do I purchase Earbuds in Nepal?</span></h2><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Depending on your consumption needs, you can select from a&nbsp;variety of earbuds in Nepal. If you want to buy earbuds or other accessories then visit our website for a variety of earbuds from different brands. It is now available at an affordable price in FatafatSewa. </span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The prices of Earbuds range from as low as Rs. 2500 to as high as </span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Rs. 12,990 </span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">where HiFuture Airbuds TWS Earbuds are the cheapest and </span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Soundcore Spirit Dot 2</span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"> is the most expensive out of the earbuds available in Fatafat sewa.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Fatafatsewa is a one-stop shopping destination and Nepal’s best service-oriented Shopping site. Fatafat Sewa is a well-known internet merchant in Lalitpur with extensive knowledge of </span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">earbuds</span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"> in Nepal. FatafatSewa also provides a no-cost EMI service.&nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">1.                             "description": "<h1 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Speaker Price In Nepal</span></h1><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">In this article, we will discuss the speaker price in Nepal and their types. Speakers can be employed in the typical home setting as well as in the workplace. The absence of a cord makes wireless Bluetooth speakers more convenient. You no longer have to be concerned about plugging in a cable and becoming attached to it. You only need to pair your device with the speakers to get started. If you want to shop online at Fatafat sewa, you can quickly search utilizing a variety of alternatives. Additionally, in our online marketplace, you may find the best and most affordable Bluetooth speaker rates in Nepal.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">These gadgets are reputed to operate quickly and very effectively. They are capable of establishing a wireless connection with any device. Players, laptops, and operating systems for the iPhone and Android round out the variety of devices. You can purchase a Bluetooth speaker online at Fatafat sewa.&nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Types Of Speakers In Nepal</span></h2><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">1. JBL Flip Essential IPX7 Waterproof 16 W Bluetooth Speaker</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">With this JBL Bluetooth speaker, you can take your party with you wherever you go. This speaker offers a flawless streaming experience thanks to its outstanding feature set, which includes 10 hours of playback time, a waterproof build, and Bluetooth connectivity.&nbsp;</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">2. boAt Stone 350 10 W Bluetooth Speaker&nbsp;</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Enjoy a flawless listening experience with the help of the boAt Stone 350 10W portable wireless speaker. 1.96 dynamic drivers are included in the speaker to provide an immersive stereo experience. With Bluetooth v5.0, it provides immediate wireless connectivity. Up to 12 hours of continuous audio playback are possible with just one complete charging of the speaker. The device also has AUX and TF Card connectivity options in addition to WiFi connectivity.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">4. Google Nest Mini (2nd Gen) with Google Assistant Smart Speaker&nbsp;</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">The Google Nest Mini serves as your personal assistant, keeping you informed and entertained from the moment you wake up until the moment you go to bed. The Nest Mini is here to brighten your day by offering you a customized schedule, reminders, weather updates, and the ability to stream your favorite music from numerous streaming sources.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">5. KSD New Portable Mini Bluetooth Speaker Ultra High Bass Power Boost Sound 10 W Bluetooth Speaker&nbsp;(Black, 4.1 Channel)</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\" class=\"ql-size-large\">Enjoy music at a glance with this little dynamite-like elegant, portable, and incredibly powerful extreme sound boost wireless speaker, which is built with a sensational and stylish aesthetic.                         {
                            "id": 31,
                            "title": "Powerbanks",
                            "slug": "powerbanks-price-in-nepal",
                            "description": "<h1><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Power Bank Price in Nepal</span></h1><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">In today's era of smartphones and technology, a power bank is a useful gadget. The prevalence of mobile phones has expanded to the point that the battery drains quickly and you can't put in a charger when you're out and about. If you needed to make an important call and left the house with a low battery, you would probably freak out.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Power banks are useful in these situations because they are portable and act as an additional battery. Let's now discuss the </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">power bank price in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\"><img src=\"https://lh5.googleusercontent.com/aJWLizaaqB03iTyrEpiNxEwDIuCkYeRlqVpz3-shgN28k5p7gYlyd12mKP7zNvWYJQesargiJqhFOm6vco6MGd-M6C9FzPjku-RnFhdu-ihgq3d2fZydT4rra7fjJ1Zqo13X785F067uUwchPQLlRq3rYw_ZsifK5dpniiqfswBhrMmMTA8_TAe7PlMD-A\" height=\"468\" width=\"624\"></span></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">A power bank is a small, lightweight, portable power source that has a significant capacity and runs without electricity.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The prices of power banks range from as low as NPR 1499 to as high as NPR 4999, where REMAX Lango Series 10000 Mah Power Bank RPP-96 is the cheapest and Remax Linze Series 22.5W Fast Charging Power Bank 20000mAh RPP-171 is the most expensive.</span></p><p><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h2><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Types of Power Bank brands available in Nepal</span></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">You have a wide range of power bank options to pick from because numerous businesses sell various sorts of power banks. You can read our in-depth information on various power bank kinds to learn more about the top power bank brands and power bank battery types.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">1. REMAX Lango Series Powerbank RPP-96</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">High efficiency and charge conversion rates are features of the Remax Lango Series Powerbank. In comparison to non-branded lithium-ion batteries, Remax's 10000 mAh polymer batteries are noticeably more durable, dependable, and secure. The Remax's front-facing LED charging indicator shows the power bank's battery's state of charge. Either a type-c port or a micro-USB port can be used to recharge the new Remax Lango Series Powerbank. To charge the power bank, you no longer need to search for a specific wire.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify ql-indent-1\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify ql-indent-1\"><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">2. Hoco J77 Power Bank With Cable</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The power bank is capable of fast charging in both directions at up to 5V/2A (max). Consequently, you are able to efficiently and swiftly charge both your gadgets and the power bank. </span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">The Hoco J77 Power Bank with Cable weighs around 242 gm and has dimensions of </span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">146 x 68 x 20 mm.</span></p><p><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></h2><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Types of power banks&nbsp;</span></h2><p><br></p><h3><br></h3><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">1. Portable Power Bank</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">You may recharge the battery with a portable power bank without being concerned about the power supply. These portable power banks are the best to take no matter where you are. Our lives are made simpler by these small devices, and our businesses finally find reliable partners. Power banks' enormous capacity is one of their biggest benefits. The battery in the gadget has a capacity of more than 20,000mAh, which is rather remarkable.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">2. Mini Portable Power Bank</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">It should come as no surprise that the most practical of these chargers are portable small chargers. They have a large power capacity due to their compact size and lightweight. Due to their modest capacity, these power banks essentially utilize fewer batteries, and the majority of them only use one battery at a time. There are two primary sorts of Mini power banks since they employ different types of batteries. Ion batteries are used in one sort of battery, and polymer batteries in another.</span></p><p><br></p><h3><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">3. High-Capacity Power Bank</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">When their power is involved, power banks with huge power capabilities will prove to be much more useful. A power bank with a lot of power contains 20,000mAh or more, and because of this amount of power, they can charge many different sorts of gadgets several times. With this much power comes the capacity to charge numerous devices simultaneously thanks to the numerous USB connections.</span></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">How do I purchase power banks in Nepal?</span></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">A reasonable price for power banks is guaranteed by Fatafat Sewa in Nepal. If you like our rates and wish to buy one, you can complete these three simple steps to get a power bank. The following is a list of every way to purchase power banks in Nepal.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Without being confused about which sorts of power banks are appropriate for you, you can get power banks online at the lowest costs. You can select from the several power bank varieties on the market depending on your needs. Mobile Power Banks are among the many tech goods available at Fatafat sewa. Get the most affordable Mobile Power Banks from Fatafat Sewa with timely home delivery and straightforward payment options.</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">1. Through the Website of Fatafat sewa,&nbsp;</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-indent-1 ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">It is the simplest way for you to make an online purchase. By simply perusing a few pages and pressing a few buttons, you may quickly have your items delivered to your home. Using our website, you may look for the ideal power bank, choose the one that best suits your requirements, and then place an order. Simply click \"Add to Cart\" next to the item you want to buy. To continue, select \"Checkout\". As soon as you've finished, we'll call to confirm your order.</span></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">2. Fatafat Sewa's Phone Order&nbsp;</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">You can reach us via phone at 9828757575. You can also give us a call to place a direct order.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: transparent; color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">3. Drop by Fatafat sewa store</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify ql-indent-1\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">If you have a chance to be in the valley, feel free to stop by. Our office is located on Jhamsikhel Road-3, Lalitpur, which is a well-liked location for many residents of Lalitpur's valley. In our store, you may get information about all electronics as well as the best power banks for your requirements. Examining all of your alternatives before making a decision will help you choose the perfect power banks for you.</span></p>",

                        {
                            "id": 32,
                            "title": "Smart Wearable",
                            "slug": "smart-wearable-price-in-nepal",
                            "description": "<h1><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Smartwatch Price in Nepal</span></h1><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\">In Nepal, </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">smartwatch price in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> can vary a lot. Basic ones start from around </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">NPR 5,000 to 10,000</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\">. If you want more features like heart rate monitoring or GPS, you might spend between</span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\"> NPR 15,000 to 30,000</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\">. Fancy ones with lots of features can cost </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">NPR 40,000</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> or more. </span><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Smart watch Price in Nepal</strong><span class=\"ql-size-large\"> change depending on what you're looking for and what's available.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><img class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">The interface of the watch can be used by the wearer to make and take phone calls from their mobile device, read email and text messages, obtain weather information, listen to music, compose email and text messages, and communicate with a digital assistant.</span></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\">Smart Watch In Nepal</span></h2><p><br></p><p><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">The smart watch price in Nepal :</strong></p><div class=\"qlbt-cell-line\" data-row=\"7\" data-cell=\"2\" data-rowspan=\"1\" data-colspan=\"1\">Rs 24999</p></td></tr></tbody></table></div><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Types of Smartwatches</span></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">There are several all-purpose smartwatches available on the market that offer a range of capabilities. Some examples of this are as follows:</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">1. Apple Watch</strong></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-indent-1 ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">A line of smartwatches called Apple Watch is manufactured by Apple Inc. It connects with iOS and other Apple services and devices and includes cellular telephony, fitness monitoring, and health-related features. The Apple Watch may independently connect to a Wi-Fi network for some data-dependent operations, such as basic communications and audio streaming. The Apple Watch generally works in combination with the user's iPhone for tasks like customizing the watch and synchronizing data with iPhone apps.&nbsp;</span></p><p class=\"ql-indent-1 ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">2. Wear OS watches</strong></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-indent-1 ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">It is the operating system for Google's smartwatches. But Wear OS is more than simply a wearables platform. The platform is home to a huge selection of apps. Many of them are identical to the apps you can get for Android. You may install apps like Google Fit, Strava, Telegram, and even Uber. The smartwatch form factor of Wear OS incorporates Google Assistant[12] technologies and mobile notifications.</span></p><p class=\"ql-indent-1 ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(67, 67, 67); background-color: transparent;\">3. Tizen watches</strong></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-indent-1 ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">An operating system based on Linux is called Tizen OS. It is largely used by Samsung and is supported by the Linux Foundation. Samsung smartwatches' rotating bezels and Tizen OS make it simple to monitor notifications, move through settings, and access other interface elements. According to Samsung, the Tizen OS has been improved to support longer battery life. While the majority of Samsung's smartphones use an altered version of Android, the company's smartwatches use Tizen Wearable, which has a separate app ecosystem from Wear.</span></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><h2><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">How do I purchase Smartwatches in Nepal?</span></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">Smartwatches give you a technologically equipped wrist. Fatafat sewa is ready to help you find the best smartwatch if you want to give it a shot and get yourself the greatest android smartwatch in Nepal. Find the lowest price smart watch online by browsing through the extensive variety of smartwatch brands at Fatafat sewa,&nbsp;including Apple, Samsung, Huawei, Sony, Samsung, HiFuture, xLab, and AQFIT Smartwatch. From the top online smartwatch retailer in Nepal, home delivery is available with an amazing return policy.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">A well-known online retailer in Lalitpur with an in-depth understanding of gadget delivery in Nepal is Fatafat Sewa. In Nepal, we provide a wide range of services. As the top distributors of smartwatches in Nepal, we go above and beyond to offer the best delivery service.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: transparent;\">At Fatafatsewa.com, one can acquire it from reputable manufacturers.                         {
                            "id": 73,
                            "title": "Microphones",
                            "slug": "microphones",
                            "description": "<h1 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Microphones Price In Nepal</span></h1><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">In this article, we will discuss microphones price in Nepal and their types. A microphone converts airborne sound waves into electrical signals that can be recorded on a recording medium or broadcast over loudspeakers. Numerous audio recording devices are made possible by microphones for a variety of communications, music vocalists, speech, and sound recording applications.&nbsp;</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Using a microphone to input voice is quicker than using a keyboard to type text. Real-time sound wave manipulation is possible. When used with voice activation systems, such as turning on the radio or keeping the phone in speaker mode, a microphone can improve the safety and security of drivers and passengers.&nbsp;</span></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Types Of Microphones Brands In Nepal</span></h2><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(15, 17, 17);\">1. Boya</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Boya is a brand of microphones that is known for producing high-quality audio equipment for a variety of applications. Some popular Boya microphones include the Boya BY-M1, which is a compact and portable lavalier microphone that is ideal for recording speech or interviews, and the Boya BY-MM1, which is a shotgun microphone that is designed for capturing directional audio and is suitable for use in video production and other applications. Boya microphones are often praised for their excellent sound quality, ease of use, and affordable prices.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(55, 65, 81);\">2. Rode</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(55, 65, 81);\">Rode is an Australian brand that is known for producing a wide range of high-quality microphones for different applications, including studio, live and field recording. Some popular Rode microphones include Rode NT1, Rode NTG2, Rode M3, and Rode NTK. Rode microphones are often praised for their excellent sound quality, durability, and ease of use. They are widely used by professionals in the music, film, and television industries, as well as by home recording enthusiasts.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(55, 65, 81);\">3. Shure</span></h3><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(55, 65, 81);\">Shure is an American brand that is known for producing professional-grade microphones for a variety of applications, including live music, broadcasting, and recording. Some popular Shure microphones include Shure SM7B, Shure SM58, Shure SM57, and Shure KSM9. Shure microphones are widely used by professionals in the music, film, and television industries, as well as by home recording enthusiasts. They are known for their excellent sound quality, durability, and reliability.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(55, 65, 81);\">4. Audio-Technica</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(55, 65, 81);\">Audio-Technica is a Japanese brand that is known for producing a range of high-quality microphones for different applications, including recording, live performance, and broadcasting. Some popular Audio-Technica microphones include Audio-Technica AT2020, Audio-Technica AT4050, Audio-Technica AT4053b, and Audio-Technica AT4050ST. Audio-Technica microphones are widely used by professionals in the music, film, and television industries, as well as by home recording enthusiasts. They are known for their excellent sound quality, durability, and reliability.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(55, 65, 81);\">5. Sennheiser</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">A powerful portable wireless Bluetooth speaker is also included, in addition to a separate mic. From a variety of devices and apps, you can play music via Bluetooth, micro SD card, or audio wire. Take it with you everywhere you go so you can listen to high-quality music whenever you want! Suitable for home karaoke, singing practice, parties, family singing, travel, classroom, presentations, car stereo karaoke, speeches, weddings, stages, interviews, and live shows, among other things, this is a wonderful gift for your family, friends, and children.</span></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><h2 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">How do I purchase Microphones in Nepal?</span></h2><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">In Nepal, you can select from a number of microphone brands depending on your needs. You can choose from a list of the top online microphone hone platforms supplied by Fatafat Sewa to find the headphone prices in Nepal that suit your preferences. Our website contains more information about it. Cash on delivery is an option for customers in the Kathmandu valley, and we ship goods all around Nepal.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Fatafat Sewa is a well-known web merchant in Lalitpur with extensive knowledge of gadget delivery in Nepal. We offer a wide range of services in Nepal, including the delivery of mobile phones, liqueurs, laptops, speakers, and many other electronic devices. We put a lot of effort into providing the best delivery we can as the leading microphone distributor in Nepal.</span></p><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Purchase the microphone from top manufacturers at fatafatsewa.com, as it is the best online platform for microphones. If you simply follow these steps, you could even wish to buy one.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">1. Through the Fatafat Sewa website</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">Select the item you want and complete the purchase by adding it to your basket. Once you have finished adding, move on to checkout. Follow the site's instructions, and you're done. A call of confirmation will shortly reach you. Then, within a few days, your items will be delivered to your area.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">2. Through Fatafat Sewa phone order</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">You can also place your order over the phone if you don't feel like going through all these processes. In order to prevent confusion regarding the product you choose, you must provide comprehensive information about it. Call us at (982) 875-7575.</span></p><p><br></p><h3 class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(67, 67, 67);\">3. Drop by Fatafat sewa store</span></h3><p><br></p><p class=\"ql-align-justify\"><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);\">You are welcome to stop by our office at Jhamsikhel Road-3, Lalitpur if you have any remaining questions concerning the goods. You'll gain more product knowledge, which will aid in decision-making.</span></p>",

                                {
                                    "id": 79,
                                    "title": "Gimbal",
                                    "slug": "gimbal-price-in-nepal",
                                    "description": "<h1><strong class=\"ql-size-large\">Gimbal Price in Nepal</strong></h1><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">Gimbal, also known as a stabilizer, is a popular device used to keep a camera steady and smooth during filming. It is especially useful for capturing smooth footage while moving, such as during a chase scene or while walking through a crowded street.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">In Nepal, the price of a gimbal can vary depending on the brand, model, and features. On average, a basic gimbal can cost around NPR 62,500 to NPR while high-end models can cost up to NPR 185,000 or more.</span></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">Some popular gimbal brands in Nepal include </span><a href=\"https://fatafatsewa.com/brand/dji-products-prices-in-nepal\" target=\"_blank\" class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">DJI</a><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">, Zhiyun, Moza, and FeiyuTech. These brands offer a wide range of gimbals at different price points, making it easy to find one that suits your budget and needs.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">When shopping for a gimbal in Nepal, it's important to consider the type of camera, Drone, or smartphone you'll be using it with, as well as the type of filming you'll be doing. Some gimbals are better suited for professional videography, while others are more suited for amateur or hobbyist use.</span></p><p><br></p><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">Overall, the price of a gimbal in Nepal can vary widely, but with some research and careful consideration, you can find a great deal on a high-quality gimbal that meets your needs.</span></p><h2><strong class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">Why gimbal is an important?</strong></h2><ol><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">First, it helps to stabilize the camera and capture smooth, steady footage. This is particularly useful for filming while moving, such as while walking or running, or while following a moving subject. This means that you will get a much more professional and cinematic look to your footage.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">Second, it enables you to capture dynamic and creative shots that would be difficult or impossible to achieve without a gimbal. For example, you can use a gimbal to smoothly pan or tilt the camera, or to capture smooth, flowing movement while walking or moving through space.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">Third, it is useful for vloggers or YouTubers as well as professional videographers. It enables them to create more professional and engaging content.</span></li><li data-list=\"bullet\"><span class=\"ql-ui\" contenteditable=\"false\"></span><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">Fourth, Gimbal also helps to reduce the chances of shaky footage caused by a hand-held movement which could be hard to watch for the viewer.</span></li></ol><p><span class=\"ql-size-large\" style=\"color: rgb(55, 65, 81); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 248);\">Overall, using a gimbal is an important tool for capturing smooth, stable, and dynamic footage, and can significantly enhance the quality and professionalism of your video content.</span></p><p><br></p>",
                                    "parent_id": 75,
                                    "status": 1,
                                    "featured": 0,
                                    "order": 0,
                                    "category_full_name": "Electronic Devices / Accessories / Drone Accessories / Gimbal",
                                    "image": "https://fatafatsewa.com/website/images/placeholder-sm.png",
                                    "images": {
                                        "id": 5267,
                                        "name": "gimbal_portable_stabilizer_holding_device_icon_134036",
                                        "default": "https://fatafatsewa.com/website/images/placeholder-lg.png",
                                        "thumbnail": "https://fatafatsewa.com/website/images/placeholder-sm.png"
                                    },
                                    "children": [],
                                    "created_at": "2022-09-09T00:51:49.000000Z",
                                    "updated_at": "2023-03-24T18:17:20.000000Z"
                                }
                            ],
                            "created_at": "2022-03-13T19:16:42.000000Z",
                            "updated_at": "2024-02-10T02:43:56.000000Z"
                        },

POST api/v1/shipping-addresses

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:8002/api/v1/shipping-addresses" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"first_name\": \"qku\",
    \"last_name\": \"lkdaqxoabmswxmncegr\",
    \"contact_number\": \"cykhi\",
    \"landmark\": \"easschvuglviolxg\",
    \"city\": \"qbxsbyi\",
    \"district\": \"ardihriluevdhemmrhhe\",
    \"province\": \"vsekouczletrgfplwjmluvnfl\",
    \"country\": \"nlipnfjtajkoevowpd\",
    \"is_default\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8002/api/v1/shipping-addresses"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "first_name": "qku",
    "last_name": "lkdaqxoabmswxmncegr",
    "contact_number": "cykhi",
    "landmark": "easschvuglviolxg",
    "city": "qbxsbyi",
    "district": "ardihriluevdhemmrhhe",
    "province": "vsekouczletrgfplwjmluvnfl",
    "country": "nlipnfjtajkoevowpd",
    "is_default": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/shipping-addresses

Headers

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

first_name   string   

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: qku

last_name   string   

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: lkdaqxoabmswxmncegr

contact_number   string   

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: cykhi

landmark   string   

'email' => 'required|email|max:255', // Removed as per schema. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: easschvuglviolxg

city   string   

Was address. Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: qbxsbyi

district   string   

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: ardihriluevdhemmrhhe

province   string   

New. Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: vsekouczletrgfplwjmluvnfl

country   string  optional  

Was state. Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: nlipnfjtajkoevowpd

is_default   boolean  optional  

Example: false

    --get "http://localhost:8002/api/v1/shipping-addresses/et" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \

    "http://localhost:8002/api/v1/shipping-addresses/et"
);

};

}).then(response => response.json());

Accept

PUT api/v1/shipping-addresses/{id}

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:8002/api/v1/shipping-addresses/laudantium" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"first_name\": \"yzx\",
    \"last_name\": \"wsfqoapnyqkfovivxcywze\",
    \"contact_number\": \"huwxjdtx\",
    \"landmark\": \"zxschwwdbst\",
    \"city\": \"msdfnzzaewdhsytutjlchcgi\",
    \"district\": \"limthwrxijhlqjkerwmwjya\",
    \"province\": \"lspjegtm\",
    \"country\": \"smlpzdyblo\",
    \"is_default\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:8002/api/v1/shipping-addresses/laudantium"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "first_name": "yzx",
    "last_name": "wsfqoapnyqkfovivxcywze",
    "contact_number": "huwxjdtx",
    "landmark": "zxschwwdbst",
    "city": "msdfnzzaewdhsytutjlchcgi",
    "district": "limthwrxijhlqjkerwmwjya",
    "province": "lspjegtm",
    "country": "smlpzdyblo",
    "is_default": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PUT api/v1/shipping-addresses/{id}

Headers

Content-Type      

Example: application/json

Accept      

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string   

The ID of the shipping address. Example: laudantium

Body Parameters

first_name   string   

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: yzx

last_name   string   

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: wsfqoapnyqkfovivxcywze

contact_number   string   

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: huwxjdtx

landmark   string   

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: zxschwwdbst

city   string   

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: msdfnzzaewdhsytutjlchcgi

district   string   

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: limthwrxijhlqjkerwmwjya

province   string   

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: lspjegtm

country   string  optional  

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: smlpzdyblo

is_default   boolean  optional  

Example: false
